Greetingz, competitor.
At your service |PLAYERNAME| and welcome to the post office.
messages.sendtrade: Here. Don't forget that you need to buy a label too if you want to send a parcel. Always write the name of the {receiver} in the first line.
Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

Cipfried.name: Cipfried
voices: Feeling lost, my child? Ask me for hints or help!
Come to me if you need healing!
Welcome to the temple of Rookgaard!
Don't despair! Help is near!

messages.greet: Hello, |PLAYERNAME|! I'll {heal} you if you are injured or poisoned. Feel free to ask me for {help} or general {hints}.

keywords.response: My name is Cipfried.
Me? Oh, I'm just a humble {monk}. Ask me if you need {help} or {healing}.
Now it is |TIME|, my child.
I have sacrificed my life to serve the good gods of {Tibia} and to help newcomers in this world.
You can deposit your money at the bank. That way you won't lose it if you get {killed}. The bank is just under the academy and to the right.
Your near destiny will be to choose a {vocation} once you are level 8. Whether you will become a {knight}, {sorcerer}, {paladin} or {druid} is a big decision!
That's where we are - the world of Tibia, in a village called {Rookgaard}, to be precise, with many {monsters}, {quests} and {citizens} around.
How can I help you? I can tell you about specific {citizens} if you tell me their name. I can also give you general {hints} about {Tibia}.

Only a few people live in our village, most of them are {merchants}. You can either ask them for a {trade} or about various other topics, like the names of other citizens, their {job} or Tibia in general.
I don't have any goods for trade, but if you ask one of the {merchants}, he or she will gladly show you what you can buy or sell.
A single rat doesn't pose a grave danger to you, but be careful not to get cornered by many of them. They could still {kill} you.
If you face spiders, beware of the {poisonous} ones. If you are poisoned, you will constantly lose health. Come to me and I'll heal you from poison.
If you get killed, you will revive in this temple. However, you will lose experience and also equipment, which can be quite painful. Take good care of yourself!
Poison is very dangerous! Don't ever drink green liquids, they are poisonous and will make you lose health!
There are four vocations in Tibia: {knight}, {sorcerer}, {paladin} or {druid}. Each vocation has its unique special abilities.
Knights are close combat fighters. They usually wield melee weapons such as swords, axes or clubs.
Druids are nature magicians. Their speciality is casting ice and earth magic, as well as providing healing for others.
Paladins are well-trained distance fighters and can cast holy magic. You will usually see them wearing bows or crossbows.
Sorcerers are elemental magicians. They have mastered fire, energy and death magic.
You can buy and sell goods from merchants. To do so, simply talk to them and ask them for a {trade}. They will gladly show you their offers and also the things they buy from you.
You can buy equipment from the {merchants} in this village once you earned some {gold}. Some {monsters} also carry equipment pieces with them.
Shovels are very useful. There may be a hidden entrance under a loose pile of stone and without a shovel, how would you know?
Never go adventuring without a rope! If you don't have one when you fall through a hole in the ground, you won't be able to leave without a rope.
To defend yourself against enemies, you will need a weapon. You can purchase weapons at {Obi}'s shop.
Food is very important for your health. If you are hurt in a fight with a {monster}, select 'Use' on food such as cheese, ham or meat to eat it. This will slowly refill your health.
As a premium adventurer, you are an official tax payer and thus privileged in many ways. For example, you can travel by {ship} and get better deals from {merchants}.
Potions will come in handy once you are in a fight deep in a dungeon. If you aren't in immediate danger, you can simply eat {food} to regain health, though.
The academy is just north of here. You can learn helpful things there from {Seymour}, if you wish to!
Well, King Tibianus of course. The island of {Rookgaard} belongs to his kingdom.
The {gods} have chosen this isle as the point of arrival for newborn souls. The {citizens} will help you if you ask them.
They created {Tibia} and all life on it. Visit our {academy} and learn about them.
Monsters are a constant threat to this village. You would tremendously help us by fighting them, starting with {rats} in the {sewers}, then turning to {spiders} or {wolves}.
You can buy and sell goods from merchants. To do so, simply talk to them and ask them for a {trade}. They will gladly show you their offers and also the things they buy from you.
The sewers are right below this village. North of this temple, you find a sewer grate which leads down, but there are also many small huts in the village which are connected to the sewers.
I'm sorry, but I'm not interested in worldly goods. If you want to buy or sell something, you should ask a local merchant for a trade.
To defend yourself against enemies, you will need armor and shields. You can purchase both at {Dixi}'s shop.
You can earn a fair amount of gold by fighting {monsters} and picking up the things they carry. Many {citizens} are buying some of that loot, simply ask around.
Oh, I can handle my tasks myself, thank you. If you are looking for something to do, you should listen to the local {citizens} and ask them for {quests}. You could also help us fight {monsters}.
Wolves can only be found outside of the village. If you want to know where their dens are, best talk to {Dallheim} or {Zerbrus} at the bridges.
I can see a bright future for you... you will soon embark on a very big adventure and explore the world of {Tibia} - maybe even influence history!
You are poisoned. I will help you.
Let me heal your wounds.
You aren't looking really bad, |PLAYERNAME|. I can only help in cases of real emergencies. Raise your health simply by eating {food}.
Obi's {shop} is to the north-east of this humble temple. He sells {weapons}, and his granddaughter {Dixi} sells {armor} and {shields} upstairs.
She recently opened a little bar north of this village.
That's a sad story. He used to help me guard this temple, but for some reason he went out of his mind.
I absolutely appreciate what he's doing. He has helped me a lot since he took up the job of welcoming newcomers to this island.
That old lady hasn't had an easy life. Her son {Tom} completely abandoned her, but I have no idea why.
In Al Dee's shop you'll find important general equipment such as {ropes}, {shovels} and torches.
Amber is such a lovely girl, and also a very experienced {explorer} and {adventurer}. It's always interesting to chat with her.
He's a farmer, just like his cousin {Willie}. He doesn't talk to everybody, though.
Willie is a farmer, just like his cousin {Billy}. His farm is located left of the temple. You can buy and sell {food} there.
Yes? How can I {help} you?
That's {Obi's} granddaughter. Her counter is just upstairs from Obi's shop. She helps him by selling {armor} and {shields}.
Hyacinth is a close friend of mine. He left the village many years ago to live in solitude. I think all this bustle here simply was too much for him.
Lee'Delle's shop is on the {premium} side of the village. You should visit her!
You must have passed the house of Lily on your way here. She sells {potions}. If you pick blueberries or find cookies, she'll buy them from you.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above {Seymour}. Go there when you are level 8 to find your {destiny}.
He is the {bank} clerk, making sure your {money} remains safe.
Seymour is a loyal follower of the {king} and a teacher in the {academy}.
Tom is the main provider for leather armor in this village. You can sell fresh corpses or even minotaur leather to him.
May the gods bless our loyal guardsmen! Day and night they stand watch on our bridges, ensuring that it is not passed by dangerous {monsters}!

Cledwyn.name: Cledwyn
voices: Trading tokens! First-class bargains!
Bespoke armor for all vocations! For the cost of some tokens only!
Tokens! Bring your tokens!

messages.greet: Blessings, Player! How may I be of service? Do you wish to trade some {token}s, or would you like some {information} or {talk}? Should I {enchant} certain items for you?

Coltrayne.name: Coltrayne
voices: Team up with others to defeat monsters!
Get your gear and help us defend Dawnport against the monsters!
Better weapons equal more damage - get yourself some gear right here!
Gird youselves! Chain mail, bows, spears, swords - we've got it all!
Skill comes with practice - get out there and kill some beasts!

messages.greet: Hey there. Need some armor or weapon? Then ask me for a {trade}.

keywords.response: Coltrayne Daggard. Just ask me for a trade to see the latest in chain mail and weapons.
I'm a blacksmith by trade. Want to keep our lads and lasses safe and equipped with a sharp blade, me.
You mean to imply I am an inexperienced guardian? Get out of here.
Yes. You wish to trade I guess. At least, you look like you could use some good gear, kid.
Good at potions. Likes experimenting. Can kit you out with magical equipment for a hunt.
Gives newcomers hints how we do things here in Tibia. Don't know how to use something? Ask Inigo.
Don't have much to say about him. Barely know him. Seems a decent spell teacher for mages.

messages.greet: Hello recruit.

Cornelia.name: Cornelia
voices: Quality armors for sale!

messages.greet: Welcome to the finest {armor} shop in the land, |PLAYERNAME|!

keywords.response: I run this armoury. If you want to protect your life, you better buy my wares.

Cornell.name: Cornell
voices: Passage to Grimvale and Edron.

messages.greet: Welcome on board, |PLAYERNAME|. Where can I {sail} you today, to {Grimvale} or {Edron}?
messages.farewell: Good bye. Recommend us if you were satisfied with our service.

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to
I can travel you to {Grimvale} or {Edron}.

messages.greet: We have to dig up valuable resources, but don't get enough to eat. The situation is terrible.
What we get to eat is really ridiculous.
We dig up all what mother earth delivers to us, valuable natural resources.
Every man is the architect of his own fortune. The times of repression are finally over.
The repression has taken too long. With our new weapons the respective people will get their just punishment.
My hero! A friend of mine sent you to liberate me? A true friend!
Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|! Feel free to tell me what has brought you here.

keywords.response: I can offer you first & second addons of the following outfit: {Wayfarer}.
Ask about {first addon} or {second addon}.
Ask about {first addon} or {second addon}.
Ask about {first addon} or {second addon}.
llected all the required pieces, say 'yes' and voila - you got yourself an addon!
To achieve the first storage addon you need to give me the Old Cape. Do you have them with you?
To achieve the second storage addon you need to give me the Sedge Hat. Do you have them with you?

Cruleo.name: Cruleo
voices: <gulp gulp>
This will earn me some handsome amount of gold!
Muhahaha!

messages.greet: Be greeted blank skin.
Be greeted, traveller |PLAYERNAME|. Welcome to my {hut}.

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to the isle of the kings for 10 gold coins?
My name is Dalbrect Windtrouser, of the once proud Windtrouser family.
I am merely a humble fisher now that nothing is left of my noble {legacy}.
Once my family was once noble and wealthy, but {fate} turned against us and threw us into poverty.
To think my family used to belong to the local nobility! And now those arrogant women are in charge!
My ship is my only pride and joy.

Dallheim.name: Dallheim
voices: The most dangerous monsters of Rookgaard are on the other side of this bridge.
Want to know what monsters are good for you at your level? Just ask me!
I'll crush all monsters who dare to attack our base.
Are you injured or poisoned? I can help you.
For Rookgaard! For Tibia!

keywords.response: Hmm, |PLAYERNAME|. I really don't know if you should go into the wilderness without a shield. You should earn some money by hunting rats under the village first until you can afford at least a wooden shield.
Dallheim, at your service.
I'm the guard of this bridge. I defend Rookgaard against the beasts of the {wilderness} and the {dungeons}, and even of the stinking {sewers}.
My duty is eternal. Time is of no importance.
Before you fight monsters, deposit your money there. If you die, you won't lose it if it's save in the bank.
Fine.
I have to stay here, sorry. But I can heal you if you are wounded. I have also valuable information about {monsters}.
I'm an expert concerning the wildlife and {monsters} on this island.
I'll protect all citizens alike. That is my {job} and duty.
Did you know that rats are among the most dangerous animals in whole Tibia? Each day, they kill many people who are overestimating their powers. Don't be one of them!
There are two types of spiders on this island: normal spiders and poison spiders. As their name says, the latter ones can poison you which will cause a constant loss of your health. Beware of them!
Once you have upgraded your starter {equipment} a little - maybe leather stuff - and got a better weapon as well as a shield, you should be able to kill trolls.
You need a stronger weapon than the starter club to kill wolves. Maybe a {sabre} or a short {sword} will do.
Orcs are a constant menace. There are even stronger species of orcs on the main continent.
Minotaurs are very strong. You will need a group of people or at least level 6 and good equipment to be able to kill them.
They are a little tougher than they look like, but they're still good beginner monsters.
The skeletons on this island are usually fairly hidden. They are often found near graves and always underground. Beware of their evil life drain.
A bear can easily kill you if you don't pay attention.
Wasps are the fastest monsters on this island and they poison you. If you ever run into one and are already low of health, fear for your life!
Snakes can poison you, too, but their poison is usually not as dangerous as that of poison spiders. Just be careful and kill them fast.
Premium warriors pay. They gain many advantages this way.
HAIL TO THE KING!
All that theory won't help you without some real battle practice.
A place of protection. Nothing can harm you there.
I can mark you some dungeons on your map if you ask me about {monsters} suited for your level.
The sewers are crowded with {rats}. They make fine targets for young heroes.
There are {wolves}, {bears}, {snakes}, {deer}, and {spiders} in the wilderness past this bridge.
I'm a follower of {Banor}.
The heavenly warrior! Hail to him!
I'm not interested in such party tricks.
A nice place for a hero, but nothing for whelps.
It's my duty to protect this village and its {citizens}.
It looks like you have mastered the drill.
Sorry, I don't trade. Ask the shop owners for a trade instead.
I don't approve of her opening a bar. Those drunken adventurers stumbling over the bridge at nighttime are not especially helpful in improving the situation.
Zerbrus tells me such strange stories about him. Well, he sees him all day from the west bridge.
He dedicated his life to welcoming newcomers to this island.
Nice old lady.
He has been on this island as long as me.
I don't trust her.
He guards the temple and can heal you if you are badly injured or poisoned, just like me.
She's {Obi's} granddaughter and deals with {armors} and {shields}. Her shop is south west of town, close to the temple.
Strange fellow, hides somewhere in the mountains of the isle.
Her shop is on the {premium} side of town. Best offers around.
Sometimes I wish I had an easy job like her, selling {potions} all day.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above Seymour. Go there when you are level 8.
The local bank clerk.
Leave me alone with this wimp.
He's the local tanner. You could try selling fresh corpses or leather to him.
At your service.
He's guarding the west bridge. Not that a real threat would lurk on the other side.
He is a fine cook and farmer. He buys and sells {food}.
You are poisoned. I will help you.
You are looking really bad. Let me heal your wounds.
You aren't looking really bad. Eat some food to regain strength.

messages.greet: Nature's blessing!
messages.farewell: May your path always be even.
messages.walkaway: May your path always be even.

messages.greet: Welcome to the wave cellar, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.farewell: Please come back from time to time.

keywords.response: I am the owner of this place of relaxation.
It's pretty, isn't it?
I am Dane.
It is exactly |TIME|.
I can offer you milk, water, and lemonade.
Alcohol makes people too aggressive. We don't need such stuff in Carlin.
Alcohol makes people too aggressive. We don't need such stuff in Carlin.
Alcohol makes people too aggressive. We don't need such stuff in Carlin.

messages.greet: Greetings and {Banor} be with you, |PLAYERNAME|!

keywords.response: I am the governor of this isle, Edron, and grandmaster of the Knights of Banor's Blood.
LONG LIVE THE KING!

Dario.name: Dario
voices: Increase your knowledge of spells here, young paladin.
Need ammunition, bows or crossbows? Have a look at my wares.

messages.greet: Ashari, |PLAYERNAME|. If you're a distance fighter, you might want to have a look at my wares and spells.
Greetings seekers of knowledge. You seem to be just the person I'm {looking} for.

keywords.response: I need the help of some competent {adventurers} to handle a threat to all creation.
This leaves us with no choice but to take action into our own {hands}.
I guess you know about the {background} and there is no need to tell you that the forces from beyond managed to acquire the parts of the godbreaker in a coup.
The secret locations of the godbreaker {parts} were revealed and due to trickery, the minions of Variphor aquired all of them.
Those pieces of knowledge come in several forms and shapes. For most I can give you more or less specific hints where to start your {search}.
You have to {find} the veiled hoard of Zathroth, breach it and destroy the knowledge how to use the godbreaker.

messages.greet: Greetings.
Hello, traveller |PLAYERNAME|. How can I help you?

keywords.response: I am the magistrate of this isle.
Thats me.
I am Dermot, the magistrate of this isle.
Time is not important on Fibula.
You are at Fibula. This isle is not very dangerous. Just the wolves bother outside the village.
Oh, my god. In the dungeon of Fibula are a lot of monsters. That's why we have sealed it with a solid door.
Oh, my god. In the dungeon of Fibula are a lot of monsters. That's why we have sealed it with a solid door.

Dixi.name: Dixi
voices: Need some help? Just ask me, I can show you around!
Don't forget to protect yourself with a shield!
Selling the finest armors on Rookgaard!
Don't let these mean monsters hurt you - get better equipment now!

messages.sendtrade: Here, take a look and choose something nice for you!

keywords.response: I'm Dixi.
<giggles> I love gossiping - err, I mean providing valuable information of course, just tell me a name! <winks>
I'm helping my grandfather {Obi} with this shop. If you like to see my offers, simply ask me for a {trade}!
It's |TIME|.
You can deposit your {money} there to keep it safe. However, you still need cash to buy something here.
The Island of Destiny can be reached via the {oracle} once you are level 8. This trip will help you choose your {profession}!
You will learn everything you need to know about professions once you reach the {Island of Destiny}.
As a premium adventurer you can visit different regions on this island, trade with {Lee'Delle} and much more.
As an adventurer, you should always have at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
If you need a torch, go see {Al Dee}'s store.
Oh, I'm sorry, but my grandfather {Obi} doesn't like seeing me waving around with pointy things. He sells weapons himself, just go downstairs!
Are you hungry? Then you should visit {Willie} or {Billy} in the West of town. {Norma} also has yummy stuff! Oh, and you could pick {blueberries} or eat the food some {monsters} carry with them.
{Lily} sells effective health potions and antidote potions against poison.
The big building in the centre of Rookgaard. They have a library, a training centre, a {bank} and the room of the {oracle}. {Seymore} is the teacher there.
King Tibianus is a wise and noble monarch. This island of {Rookgaard} belongs to his kingdom.
Our lovely village will provide shelter for you. Once you are level 8, you can travel to {mainland} and choose a {profession}.
If you want to fight monsters in {dungeons}, you definitely need some good {equipment} such as a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
Just ask me for a {trade} to check out my offers.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see what I buy from you.
To view the offers of a merchant, simply talk to him or her and ask for a {trade}.
There are many blueberry bushes in and around this village. Just use them to your liking!
You need to make sure you have some basic {equipment} before you head into dungeons such as the {sewers}.
There is a sewer grate which you can use to enter the sewers just left of this building. Eww, this smell!
I'm fine, thank you.
How can I help you? I can give you general {hints}, information about {citizens} or talk about many other topics. Just ask me!
I'm sorry honey, but I can't lend you gold. Earn it yourself by fighting {monsters} and picking up the things they carry. Sell it to {merchants} to make profit!
You should never embark on an adventure without it. Ask {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle} for it!
Yes, I can sell that to you. Just ask me for a {trade} to see what I buy from you.
Me and my grandfather {Obi} sell {equipment} of all kinds. Just ask him or me for a {trade} if you like to see our offers.
Norma used to sell {equipment}, but she finally earned enough {money} to fulfil one of her dreams - her own bar!
I never understand what he's talking about.
I'm glad that he's here. He does a great job!
Sometimes, I help Zirella collecting wood. Her old back aches all the time. It's a shame her son Tom doesn't help her.
In Al Dee's shop you will find important general equipment such as {ropes}, {shovels} and torches.
One day, I want to become a brave adventurer like her and leave this town!
Billy can be kind of scary. He swears a lot and doesn't talk to everybody.
Uncle Willie and {Billy} are farmers, which means they are a good place to sell and buy {food}.
He can heal you if you're injured or poisoned.
Did I hear my name somewhere?
I think he's a bit strange, living alone outside this village. How can he dislike to chat with everybody here?
Lee'Delle's shop is on the {premium} side of the village. You should visit it!
I always give my cookies and blueberries to Lily. She loves them! Also, she sells {potions}.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above {Seymour}. Go there when you are level 8 to find your {destiny}.
He is the local {bank} clerk.
Seymour is a loyal follower of the {king} and a teacher in the {academy}.
I wish he would talk to his mother {Zirella} again. I feel so sorry for her. Anyway, as Tom is a tanner, you can sell leather and fresh corpses to him.
He's one of our reliable guardsmen. Without them, many {monsters} would roam the village of {Rookgaard}!

messages.greet: Stand still on the examination platform |PLAYERNAME|.
Greetings, |PLAYERNAME|! Why do you disturb me?
Hello there, hmm just... just wait right there, I'll be with you in a second. Just getting this {experiment} done...
Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|! Do you feel adventurous? Do you want a weekly {ticket} for the ore wagon system here? You can use it right here to get to the centre of Kazordoon!
Hi, come closer. Have a look at my wares.
Hiho, fellow knight |PLAYERNAME|!

keywords.response: In this category I have '{Wound Cleansing}' and '{Cure Poison}'.
In this category I have '{Light}', '{Find Person}' and '{Great Light}'.
I can teach you {healing spells} and {support spells}. What kind of spell do you wish to learn? You can also tell me for which level you would like to learn a spell, if you prefer that.

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

Eclesius.name: Eclesius
voices: I'm looking for a new assistant!
Err, what was it again that I wanted...?
Do come in! Mind the step of the magical door, though.
I'm so sorry... I promise it won't happen again. Problem is, I can't remember where I made the error...
Actually, I STILL prefer inexperienced assistants. They're easier to keep an eye on and don't tend to backstab you.
So much to do, so much to do... uh... where should I start?

messages.greet: Who are you? What do you want? You seem too experienced to become my assistant. Please leave.
Ashari, |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: Would you like to receive that protection for a sacrifice of |BLESSCOST| gold, child?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

Eddy.name: Eddy
voices: Have you moved to a new home? I'm the specialist for equipping it.

messages.greet: Hello |PLAYERNAME|! Do you need some equipment for your house?
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain {type} of furniture?

keywords.response: I have {beds}, {chairs}, {containers}, {decoration}, {flowers}, {instruments}, {pillows}, {pottery}, {statues}, {tapestries} and {tables}. Which of those would you like to see?

Edgar-Ellen.name: Edgar-Ellen
voices: Orshabaal was out of his maze to make us suffer for many days. In Calmera, a knight with blue beard from his hideout appeared. He fought bravely supported by mages, the demon ran and is gone for ages.

A knight from Guardia needed Chayenne's key. His friend dropped the item on the floor, hoping no one would see. But, at the same moment, a man crossed their way and all the knight's dreams faded away.
A knight from Candia was dining at Frodo's hut, devouring plates full of meat and whatnot. Suddenly, he was called to fight. He wanted to put his armor on but it was too tight.
The druid entered a Premian pyramid intent on the kill, 'Oh, that djinn will die, it will!' Down and up the stairs she hopped like a cat... When, Oops! She moved the wrong way, and died a drunk rat.
Hoping to find a strange orc in his spawn, a Zaneran knight logged on before dawn. A sudden heart attack left him surprised as Sam's old backpack he had recognised.
The world I shall save', an Olympian knight proclaimed! But from a visit to the bar he could not abstain! He woke up in pain, it all was in vain. From Venorian beer he will forever refrain.
During the dark and scary night, when others sleep he goes to fight, banishing demons, that feels right, purging the evil on the sight, fearlessly waiting for daylight, Zeluna's bravest elite knight.
A druid from Celesta once talked with a girl, he even bought her a necklace with a huge white pearl. Every time he went home, without money and fame, I guess this girl is cursed, Aruda is the name.

A story of a knight untold, on Rowana the dice she rolled. She lured players from afar. Who could resist a shining star? She promised gold and many items, then stole their heart with cunning kindness.
Do you think it's just a game? Don't you fear the dragon's flame? If you are as brave as bright, if you do not stray from fight, you may want to hear tonight, the tale of Guardia's lonely knight.
For a knight from Yanara 10,000 gold were a lot. So he ventured with a team into the desert to win that pot. He solved all the riddles, strongly willed. But on his journey home he sadly was killed.
A great mage from Celesta went dungeon down deep, he was very brave but his wand was cheap. Among white skeletons one of them was red. Last what he saw were the words: 'You are dead!'
A young sorcerer born and raised on Astera when dragons were scary, it was that kind of era. Walking all the way to the city of Venore, he stole from the dwarven bridge nothing less than an iron ore.
A druid from Eternia just bought his first boots of haste, to finally have his leather boots replaced. Catching a backpack of fish was now his dream, but he ended up swinging his new boots upstream.
A sorcerer from Efidia took his horse and got it saddled, and set out for battle. His horse lost control and threw him into a hole. Now his team lost all hope, because he forgot to bring a rope.
A knight in Guardia was feeling bored. He wanted to show a dragon lord the taste of his new carlin sword. To its lair then he did go. But before he saw his foe, he met his end by a one hit K.O.
On Secura a confident knight levelled to main, 840 rats he had slain. 'I am going to kill dragons,' he said while pounding his breastplate. The next thing he saw was: 'You have met a sad fate.'
One morning frosty fresh and nice, a knight was fishing on the ice. Catching some pikes for soup, but a dire penguin ate his loot. His angry wife said in the house: Now whole Beneva will laugh at us!
A paladin slaying dragons on Antica's soil, when a lord charges on to make the adventurer's blood boil. It puts up a strong fight, but to no avail. It gets slain and drops a dragon scale mail!
Through Rookgaard's sewer there swarmed no fewer than a hundred screeching rats. Wading through mud, and covered in blood, two young men fought back-to-back. To Trimera's end; a knight, and a friend.

messages.greet: This world is nothing without poetry, don't you think? It gives us hope, it envokes love. It's inciting and invigorating all the same.

keywords.response: Our world, our home, our very own plane of existence. We have to protect it, mind you. Underneath all the battles, challenges and monsters there still resides a majestic, yet vulnerable being. A mother to us all.
A king and a beggar know more than a king alone... ahem, except for King Tibianus. He most certainly would. All hail King Tibianus etc. etc.
So, you're on a mission. Aren't we all? A quest to savour the important moments, the valuable memories? To fight for love and happiness, heroically and against all odds? Yes, we are indeed.
So, you're on a mission. Aren't we all? A quest to savour the important moments, the valuable memories? To fight for love and happiness, heroically and against all odds? Yes, we are indeed.
Rather a calling. The weight of words is something not easily lifted by some, yet it can be a mighty weapon to others. ...

Edowir.name: Edowir
voices: I'm just an old man, but I know a lot about Tibia.

messages.greet: Oh, hello |PLAYERNAME|! How nice of you to visit an old man like me.
messages.farewell: Come back whenever you're in need of wisdom.
messages.walkaway: Come back whenever you're in need of wisdom.

keywords.response: I gather wisdom and knowledge. I am also an astrologer.

Edvard.name: Edvard
voices: Have you moved to a new home? I'm the specialist for equipping it.

messages.greet: Welcome to Edron Furniture Store, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain {type} of furniture?

keywords.response: Well, as you can see, I sell furniture. Ask me for a {trade} if you're interested to see my wares.

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Welcome to the paladins' guild, |PLAYERNAME|! How can I help you?

keywords.response: We are always looking for sniper gloves. They are supposed to raise accuracy. If you find a pair, bring them here. Maybe I can offer you a nice trade.
I am the leader of the Paladins. I help our members.
I am the leader of the Paladins. I help our members.
Paladins are great warriors and magicians. Besides that we are excellent missile fighters. Many people in Tibia want to join us.
Of course, we aren't as strong as knights, but no druid or sorcerer will ever defeat a paladin with a sword.
There are many magic spells and runes paladins can use.
Paladins are the best missile fighters in Tibia!
I am a paladin, not a storyteller.
Every paladin profits from his vocation. It has many advantages to be a paladin.
We will help you to improve your skills. Besides I offer spells for paladins.
Harkath Bloodblade is the royal general.
Some paladins serve in the kings army.
He has some potential.
How spineless do you have to be to become a jester?
The McRonalds are simple farmers.
He must have been skilled before he became the way he is now. Such a pity.
Yes?
The alcohol he sells shrouds the mind and the eye.
One of the most important members of our guild. She makes all the bows and arrows we need.
He sells a lot of useful equipment.
He and his guildfellows lack the grace of a true warrior.
A fine warrior and a skilled general.
King Tibianus is a wise ruler.
A follower of evil that will get what he deserves one day.
Mhm, a little too nice for my taste. Still, it's amazing how she endures all those men stalking her, especially this creepy Oswald.
A skilled healer, that's for sure.
Just another arrogant sorcerer.
If there wouldn't be higher powers to protect him...
A humble monk and a wise man.
Strong man. But a little shy.

messages.greet: Be greeted |PLAYERNAME|. What is your {business} near the {hellgate}?

keywords.response: For safety we keep the door to the hellgate locked all times. I have the {keys} to open it when needed.
For safety we keep the door to the hellgate locked all times. I have the {keys} to open it when needed.
Not that I like to talk to you, but I am Elathriel Shadowslayer.
It's one of the more useful concepts we can learn from the other races.
It's hard for some of my people to grasp the true concept of a strong leader.
I mastered some battle spells.
I couldn't care less.
A human weakling, not much more.
A human weakling, not much more.
Druidic magic is too peaceful for my taste.
I have seen human sorcerers doing some impressive things ... before they died.
We might use the shelter earth and hills provide us, but their obsession for metal is a waste of time.
I still doubt it exists.
Even if he'd walk through the town above, the other castes would not see the necessity to follow OUR way.
Arrogant bastards, but they wield quite powerful magic.
Dreamers are of no practical use. I don't mourn their demise.
Confused cowards. For all their skill, they still tend to hide and run. What a waste.
We are the heart of the elven society. We forge, we build, and we don't allow our people to be pushed around.
We watch this city and the actions of its inhabitants closely.
The Thaian kingdom and we share some enemies, so it's only logical to cooperate in a few areas.
I offer hardly anything except for knowledge of {spells}.
I offer hardly anything except for knowledge of {spells}.
I offer hardly anything except for knowledge of {spells}.

messages.greet: Be greeted. What brings you {here}?
Ashari |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: The elves of this city are the casts of the Cenath, the Kuridai, and the Deraisim.
I am a guardian of this town. I have no time to chat!
The Cenath are magic users. Look for them on the upper levels of the town.
The Deraisim are scouts and hunters. You may find them on the groundlevel of the city.
There are no Teshial.
If you are looking for that kind of equipment you should ask a Kuridai.
Ask around in Ab'Dendriel. Many elves can teach you something about magic. The Cenath love magic most of all.
The city of the humans lies somewhere far to the south beyond the mountains of the dwarfs.

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|. Which of my fine gems do you {need}?

keywords.response: I am a jeweller. Maybe you want to have a look at my wonderful {offers}.
Well, I sell gems and {goblets}. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Ah, our newest import! We have golden goblets, silver goblets and bronze goblets. All of them have space for a hand-written dedication.

messages.greet: <nods>
Ashari |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: I sell musical instruments of many kinds.
I sell lyres, lutes, drums, and simple fanfares.
Music is an attempt to condensate emotions in harmonies and save them for the times to come.
Time has its own song. Close your eyes and listen to the symphony of the seasons.
Everything is a song. Life, death, history ... everything. To listen to the song of something is the first step to understand it.
Everything is a song. Life, death, history ... everything. To listen to the song of something is the first step to understand it.
We are the most graceful of all races. We feel the music of the universe in our hearts and souls.
They could dig some halls for a big musical event, but they won't listen to me about that matter.
I bet they were great musicians.
That is some god the humans worship. Our pople are not interested in this gods anymore.
They are too loud and don't even understand the concept of a melody.
The other deraisim are too much concerned with mastering the nature so they don't listen to its music anymore.
The Cenath think they know the 'art' but the only true art is the music.
I went down to the mines and tried to lighten up their spirit, the foolish creatures did not listen to my songs, though.
Sorry, I don't feel like teaching magic today.

For the worst of crimes, criminals are cast into hellgate. It is said no one can return from there. Since it is not actually forbidden to enter hellgate, you might convince Elathriel to grant you entrance.

Elyen Ravenlock.name: Elyen Ravenlock
voices: <hums a dark tune>
<chants> Re Ha, Omrah, Tan Ra...
The rats... the rats in the walls...

messages.greet: A shadow preceded you. You wish a {scroll} or a {mission}?

Emael.name: Emael
voices: Not enough space for all my trophies...

messages.farewell: I wish you a good hunt. Goodbye!

messages.greet: HAIL TO THE QUEEN!
messages.farewell: LONG LIVE THE QUEEN! You may leave now!

keywords.response: I am privileged to be in service of our beloved queen!
We are proud people who fought hard for their freedom and won't allow others to oppress us again.
I am the head of Carlin's Girls Brigade, also known as CGB.
I am the head of Carlin's Girls Brigade, also known as CGB.
I am known as Emma.
The Thaians never got over the fact that we gained our independence. They do everything they can to hinder the prospering of our city.
Venore is a hellhole of evil. The trade barons' greed lets them plot against all other cities and even against each other.
Svargrond is an important project for our city. It's not a colony but many of our people live there alongside those barbarians. If everything works out fine, Carlin and Svargrond will both prosper.
Strange people with strange customs live in this city. Luckily, we rarely have to deal with them.
Darashia never bothers about the affairs of other cities.
It's just another Thaian puppet. Still, it is distant enough to stand a fair chance to get rid of Thais's oppression one day.
The dwarfs of Kazordoon usually mind their own business. I wish all other cities would do the same.
I can promote you for 20000 gold coins. Do you want me to promote you?
I can promote you for 20000 gold coins. Do you want me to promote you?

messages.greet: What the... I mean, of course I sensed you.
Welcome to my little garden, adventurer |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.farewell: It was a pleasure to help you, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.walkaway: It was a pleasure to help you, |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: Would you like to receive that protection for a sacrifice of |BLESSCOST| gold, child?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
Should I teleport you back to Pemaret?
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I am Eremo, an old man who has seen many things.

messages.greet: I greet thee, outsider.
messages.farewell: Asha Thrazi. Go, where you have to go.

keywords.response: I am the leader of the Cenath caste.
The Kuridai are aggressive and victims of their instincts. Without our help they would surely die in a foolish war.
Gods are for the weak. We will master the world on our own. We need no gods.
They lack the understanding of unity. We are keeping them together and prevent them from being slaughtered one by one.
We are the shepherds of our people. The other castes need our guidance.
Magic comes almost naturally to the Cenath. We keep the secrets of ages.
I can teach the spells 'magic shield', 'destroy field', 'creature illusion', 'chameleon', 'convince creature', and 'summon creature'.

messages.greet: Welcome |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: What addon you are looking? I need for first addon: {dream warden mask} and for second {dream warden claw}.
To achieve the first dream addon you need to give me 1 dream warden mask. Do you have them with you?
To achieve the second dream addon you need to give me 1 dream warden claw. Do you have them with you?

Eshaya.name: Eshaya
voices: Praised be Suon and Bastesh.
I should talk to Kallimae soon.
Issavi's safety is my first concern.

messages.greet: Suon's and Bastesh's blessing, dear guest!
Hello, |PLAYERNAME| and welcome to my little forge.
Hello my friend. What a delight to see you, even on a busy day. You can check your status or ask me about the location of ongoing raids.
Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Hello! I guess you are here for a {mission}.

messages.farewell: Farewell, human. I will always remember you. Unless I forget you, of course.
messages.walkaway: Farewell, human. I will always remember you. Unless I forget you, of course.

messages.greet: Greetings, adventurer!

keywords.response: I'm professor Falonzo from the mage's guild.
I'm a researcher of scientific council of the mage guild and I came to that {place} to study this {anomaly}.

This is a lesser plane of tarnished, elemental fire that once belonged to the world that we know. It was despoiled in the wars of the gods and broke loose from our world. {Lost} and drifting through the void, without a connection to our plane.
Infernalists were the first who found their way into this sphere. Hoping to tap its rotten power somehow. Yet this sphere created creatures of its own and draw others here from other planes.
Well, that was how it used to be. Lost and without any connection to our world. But that was before things ... have {changed}.
Such an anomaly can't go unnoticed for long. That lead to the presence to unwanted {intruders} and other entities were {dragged} into by the nature of the sphere.

Faloriel.name: Faloriel
voices: Health potions! Mana potions! Buy them here!
All kinds of potions available here!

messages.greet: Greetings, dear guest and welcome to my {potion} shop.
Hello fighter. I guess you are here to {fight} for our noble {cause}.

Feizuhl.name: Feizuhl
voices: I sell furniture both to the mourned and the enlightened.

messages.greet: Be mourned pilgrim in flesh and welcome to the furniture store.
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain type of furniture?

messages.farewell: LONG LIVE THE QUEEN! You may leave now!

keywords.response: MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the queen greet with her title!
MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the queen greet with her title!

Fenech.name: Fenech
voices: Offering all sorts of magic equipment.

messages.greet: Be mourned pilgrim in flesh and welcome to the magic store.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

keywords.response: You want me to transport you and your spouse back to {Fibula}?

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

Fiona.name: Fiona
voices: The Edron academy is always in need of magical ingredients!

messages.greet: Good day, |PLAYERNAME|. I hope you bring a lot of {magical ingredients} with you.
messages.farewell: Good bye and please come back soon.
messages.walkaway: Good bye and please come back soon.
messages.sendtrade: Sure, take a look. Apart from those, I also buy some of the possessions from famous demonlords and bosses. Ask me about it if you found anything interesting.

keywords.response: Oof, there are too many to list. Magical ingredients can sometimes be found when you defeat a monster, for example bat wings. I buy many of these things if you don't want to use them for quests, just ask me for a {trade}.

messages.greet: Be greeted, living soul!

Florentine.name: Florentine
voices: Embellish your home with flowers!

messages.greet: Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|. What can I do for you?
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares.

messages.greet: Don't you see that I'm trying to write a poem? <sighs> So what's the matter?

Frans.name: Frans
voices: Aaaaah... ruuunes... waaaaaands... rooooods... spellboooooks...

messages.greet: Beeee greeeeted, Simula! What is your neeeed?
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Hi there and welcome to my little magic shop.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.walkaway: I hope you have a cold day, friend.
messages.farewell: I hope you have a cold day, friend.
messages.greet: Welcome, to my cool home.

Frodo.name: Frodo
voices: Come into my tavern and share some stories!

messages.greet: Welcome to Frodo's Hut. You heard about the {news}?
messages.farewell: Please come back from time to time.
messages.walkaway: Please come back from time to time.

keywords.response: I hope you like it. Would you like some {food}?
I am the owner of this saloon. I call it Frodo's Hut. I am also {selling} food.
I can offer you bread, cheese, ham, or meat. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a trade.
Some travelers from Edron told about a great treasure guarded by cruel demons in the dungeons there.
Oh, our beloved king! Thanks to him, alcohol is so cheap.
Harkath Bloodblade is the royal general.
Hehe. Great customers.
Just call me Frodo.
It is exactly |TIME|.
Ah yes, the graveyard dungeon. All I know is this riddle: His Grave to the south, the tree above, his soul in the shade. No idea what that means, though!
I heard it when I was a child.
Yes, I remember him. His name was Berfasmur.
Sorry, he spoke only very little. I know nothing more about him.
Come on! You know that our world is called Tibia.
Nothing more than a tale for warriors.
Uhm, do not mention him. It may scare customers away.
No idea who that is, but maybe you'll find something in the Royal Archives...
Oh, the Royal Archives are in Rain Castle!
The king's residence has been renovated lately.
Many travellers tell funny stories about all the emancipated women in this northern town.
Here in Thais is the center of Tibia.
He is a little shy. In his youth he dreamed to become a druid.
He's able to drink a bottle or two.
I am trying to hire him for an evening or two.
Oh, that old guy! He's a good customer, that's for sure.
Can you believe that she actually told her guildfellows that alcohol is a bad thing?
She makes excellent arrows and bows.
Many of his customers visit my Hut, too.
The knights have sometimes parties here after some arena fights.
Too disciplined to enjoy life.
I think some time ago a stranger from Fibula with that name stayed here for some nights.
I overheard some conversations about his evilness. That's enough to hope, that I never ever meet him.
A sorceress, you can find her in their guild sitting befor a book - always!
Just between you and me: What a babe!
Marvik seldom leaves his guildhall at all.
The McRonalds are a nice couple. Donald is a dear friend of mine.
Muriel has never visited this place.
I hate him. Each of his visits here ends with a bar brawl.
He hardly visits my humble tavern.
A loud neighbour, I get a lot of complaints about him.
That fellow is filthy rich. He rented a room upstairs for months in advance and always orders the best beer and wine i serve.
I don't know where he gets these fluids. If I could sell them here, the hut would be crowded.

messages.greet: No, you can't have my nose! If you're in need of a {carrot}, go to the market or just dig up one! Or did you come to bring me a {percht skull}?

keywords.response: What about 'no' do you not understand, hrm? You are more annoying than any {percht} around here! Not to mention those bothersome {bunnies} who try to graw away my nose!
Well why didn't you say that rightaway, if you give me such a skull I can give you one of my {sleighs}.
Always trying to eat my nose!

messages.farewell: Farewell, stranger. May Uman open your minds and your hearts to Daraman's wisdom!
messages.walkaway: Farewell, stranger. May Uman open your minds and your hearts to Daraman's wisdom!

messages.greet: How could I help you?

Galuna.name: Galuna
voices: Bows, crossbows and ammunition on special sale today.

messages.greet: Oh, please come in, |PLAYERNAME|. What do you need? Distance weapons? I sell lots of them.

Gamel.name: Gamel
voices: Pssst!

messages.greet: Pssst! Be silent. Do you wish to {buy} something?
messages.walkaway: Bye. Tell others about... my little shop here.
messages.farewell: Bye. Tell others about... my little shop here.

Gamon.name: Gamon
voices: Any time's a good time to buy some furniture!

messages.greet: Nice to meet you, Mister |PLAYERNAME|! Looking for furniture? You've come to the right place!
messages.farewell: You'll come back. They all do.
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain type of furniture?

keywords.response: Making a stake from a chair? Are you insane??! I won't waste my chairs on you for free! You will have to pay for it, but since I consider your plan a blasphemy, it will cost 5000 gold pieces. Okay?
In this category I have '{Lighthealing}', '{Healfriend}', and '{Curepoison}'.
I am Garamond Starstream.
I have an old friend there. Haven't heard from him in a while.
Roughened and toughened by life's tragedies. A good man, but somber.
Yes, child. If you wish to learn a spell, tell me.

messages.greet: You again? How could you flee from the last floor. The cultists should have 'dealt' with you! That beats me. You have to leave this place right now. There's nothing more to say.
Chhhhzzz. Ugly humanzzz! You better have a good reazzzon to be here!
Hehehe.
messages.farewell: Hope you die and lose it.

keywords.response: Barbarians are stupid.
Bronbronbronbronbron. Bronnnn!
Can I have free outfits?
That's me.
Ajax is even more stupid.
You are as stupid as Bron.
Any cyclops is smarter than Bron.

messages.greet: Have you come to answer Gelidrazah's questions?
Greeting, |PLAYERNAME|! I welcome you to this sacred {place}. If you are interested in {missions} just ask.

keywords.response: This place is a sanctuary of Crunor and provides me with a opportunity of spiritual contemplation.
We focus our interest on this we see as threatening for live and the laws of nature itself.
We might not be many but we are diverse. Our rather informal order came together in the dawn of time, when the wars of the gods ravaged the world.
Interference comes in different forms. In this particular case there is sadly little time for subtlety and a more direct approach is necessary.
The fae granted me permission to enter their hidden realm. As a druid I'm in close touch with nature so I could gain their trust. The nature spirits are inhabiting this peninsula for ages.
Those cults have to be stopped by any means possible. These are desperate times and they demand desperate actions.
Spare lives where you see it fit but the cults may not be allowed to exist and disrupt the fabric of the world even more.
The weakened fabric of our reality still repels the unnatural intruder. The cults provide the thing a hold and supply it with more power, even if we couldn't figure out yet, how this works at all.
I have several missions available that deal with servering the ties of the corrupting influence on our world.

Gewen.name: Gewen
voices: Nothing beats the feeling of flying with a carpet!

messages.greet: Greetings, traveller |PLAYERNAME|. Where do you want me to {fly} you? Or do you need a weekly ticket for the Kazordoon public lorry transport?

keywords.response: Never heard about a place like this.
Do you seek a ride to
I can fly you to {Darashia}, {Svargrond}, {Edron}, {Issavi}, {Zao}, {Femor Hills} or to {Marapur} if you like. Where do you want to go?

Ghorza.name: Ghorza
voices: Great Hunger is upset.
Spirits are restless.
All water drying up and Vuzrog does nothing!

messages.greet: Hello, scraggy human.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Greetings {mortal}.

keywords.response: We are the {guardians}. We are all what is left from the glory of the past.
We are the keepers of this old temple and the guardians of its sacred {secrets}.
We are keepers of the {lore} of the Great {Snake} and we guard some of its {relics}.
The lore of the Great {Snake} is contorted like a snake. Although we feel you are touched by the snake's essence, you are not ready yet to receive the blessing of the deeper wisdom.
Once the powerful relics of the Great {Snake} were abundant. Most got lost to the ravages of time and our enemies. What is {left} is all the more precious.
We are the guardians. We are all what is left from the glory of the past.

What you call Banuta was once a centre of our civilisation and culture. We gave those {apes} so much, but they wanted more. In the end, the Great {Snake} used them as a tool to teach our people a painful but necessary lesson.

In their vanity our descendants thought they could use those false-born as servants. They paid a terrible price. Their downfall might only be temporary though if we can {redeem} our race in the eyes of the snake god.
Dragons are one of the greatest creations of the Great {Snake}. Yet, they are still distanced from the Great {Snake} and susceptible for {corruption} and the lies of the egg stealers.

There are many forms of corruption in this world. All of it is the work of the egg stealers who spread their taint. The creation hatched by the Great {Snake} was perfect without even the option of corruption.
Creatures from beyond. Greedy and traitorous, they stole parts of the world and of life for themselves. They corrupted the world by their deceptions and stole our {birthright}.
We were overthrown by those of who we vainly thought we could use for our advantage, even though we knew about the foulness of the false-born.
Everything that lacks scales is no true litter of the Great Snake. They are the corrupted kin of the egg stealers.
Such concepts are of little consequence for the dead.
They are a manifestation of the snake god's power. They are its avatars in some way.
We are the true-born. We are the children of the snake. But as children we have yet much to learn. One day we might take our rightful place in creation, but only if we prove {worthy}.
They are the false-born. They hatched from foul eggs - poisoned by the egg stealers. They are numerous and like a plague for the world.
This was once the centre of power of our religion. From here we ruled Tiquanda in the name of the snake god.
We were not aware of another civilisation that was left. Only recently the awareness of the Great Snake touched us in our slumber and we learnt through visions of its other children.

messages.farewell: Farewell! May the serene light of the enlightened one rest shine on your travels.
messages.sendtrade: At your service, just browse through my wares.

messages.farewell: LONG LIVE THE KING! You may leave now!

keywords.response: MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the king greet with his title!
MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the king greet with his title!

Hawkhurst.name: Hawkhurst
voices: There's a storm brewing.

messages.greet: Ahoy, matey! Lookin' for a {passage}, eh.

keywords.response: Ye' want a passage back to cormaya? {Yes} or {no}.

messages.greet: Greetings, fellow {believer} |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.walkaway: This ungraceful haste is most suspicious!

keywords.response: It's a shame that only a few paladins still use their abilities to further the cause of the gods of good. Too many paladins have become selfish and greedy.
Nowadays, most knights seem to have forgotten the noble cause to which all knights were bound in the past. Only a few have remained pious, serve the gods and follow their teachings.
Those who wield great power have to resist great temptations. We have the burden to eliminate all those who give in to the temptations.
The druids here still follow the old rules. Sadly, the druids of Carlin have left the right path in the last years.
The dwarfs are allied with Thais but follow their own obscure religion. Although dwarfs keep mostly to themselves, we have to observe this alliance closely.
The dwarfs are allied with Thais but follow their own obscure religion. Although dwarfs keep mostly to themselves, we have to observe this alliance closely.
Those elves are hardly any more civilised than orcs. They can become a threat to mankind at any time.
Those elves are hardly any more civilised than orcs. They can become a threat to mankind at any time.

Venore is somewhat difficult to handle. The merchants have a close eye on our activities in their city and our authority is limited there. However, we will use all of our influence to prevent a second Carlin.
Drefia used to be a city of sin and heresy, just like Carlin nowadays. One day, the gods decided to destroy this town and to erase all evil there.
Darashia is a godless town full of mislead fools. One day, it will surely share the fate of its sister town Drefia.
Demons exist in many different shapes and levels of power. In general, they are servants of the dark gods and command great powers of destruction.
Carlin is a city of sin and heresy. After the reunion of Carlin with the kingdom, the inquisition will have much work to purify the city and its inhabitants.
We can see his evil influence almost everywhere. Keep your eyes open or the dark one will lead you on the wrong way and destroy you.
The church of Crunor works closely together with the druid guild. This makes a cooperation sometimes difficult.
We owe to the gods of good our creation and continuing existence. If it weren't for them, we would surely fall prey to the minions of the vile and dark gods.
The churches of the gods united to fight heresy and dark magic. They are the shield of the true believers, while the inquisition is the sword that fights all enemies of virtuousness.
The churches of the gods entrusted me with the enormous and responsible task to lead the inquisition. I leave the field work to inquisitors who I recruit from fitting people that cross my way.
Belive on the gods and they will show you the path.
By edict of the churches I'm the Lord Inquisitor.
I'm Henricus, the Lord Inquisitor.

messages.greet: Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|. The {spiritual} world looks upon you and your deeds.

Hoggle.name: Hoggle
voices: Oh, this misery...

messages.greet: Welcome to my humble home!
|PLAYERNAME|, good day .. or night, whatever.
Welcome, noble |PLAYERNAME|

keywords.response: Would you like to receive that protection for a sacrifice of |BLESSCOST| gold, child?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

messages.greet: Howdy partner.

keywords.response: I'm just a simple {huntsman}.
Sorry, I don't think telling a stranger your name is a smart thing to do.

messages.greet: Greetings, traveller |PLAYERNAME|. As you have found the way to my hut, how can I {help} you?
messages.sendtrade: Here. Don't forget, if you buy potions, there's a {deposit} of 5 gold on the empty flask.

keywords.response: Thank you so much! I'm just too old to walk into the village each day, and the herbs must be fresh. Say, would you like to have a sample of my potions as reward?
Well, then I must have mistaken you with someone else. Or did you lose it on the way?
Oh, but I insist! After all you made the long way. Please, take my reward!
Well, make some space and then talk to me again. I give you something really useful.
Time doesn't matter to me.
I'm Hyacinth.
I'm a {druid} and healer, a follower of {Crunor}.
May Crunor bless you and protect you on your journeys!
There are only two other druids on Rookgaard, {Lily} and {Cipfried}.
Storage for worldly wealth.
Who knows what it will be? Only time will show.
Thank the gods, I'm fine.
What help do you seek? I sell health potions, ask me for a {trade} if you need one.
I can't teach you magic. On the {mainland} you will learn spells early enough.
I'm one of the few magic users on this isle. I can sense a follower of the dark path of magic hiding somewhere in the depths of the dungeons.
It is shaped by the will of the gods, so we don't have to question it.
I used to be there with my old friend Cipfried to heal adventurers. After all these years, I prefer solitude now.
Teaching you about the gods would require too much time. But you can always read the books in the {library}.
The library is in the {academy}, north of the {temple}.
A place to learn about {Tibia}.
Are you hungry? I'm sorry, I have no food here.
Yes, I sell small health potions. Ask me for a trade if you need one.
I don't care about kings, queens, and the like.
I rarely visit the town. It's much better here.
There's a huge world waiting for you.
Most of the so-called monsters of this isle are only creatures of the gods. There are some beasts that are truly monstrous on the {mainland}.
Are you hungry? I'm sorry, I have no food here.
The dungeons are dangerous for inexperienced adventurers.
Just ask me for a {trade} to check out my offers. I have only small health potions for sale, though.
You'll have to buy that from the merchants in town. I'm just a simple druid and healer.
I'll pay you 5 gold for every empty vial and potion flask. Just ask me for a {trade}.
A greedy and annoying person just like most people are.
Now she has completely gotten out of her mind.
He was a promising young druid when something happened to his mind. It's a sad story.
He does a good job out there.
I know her since she was little.
One of these greedy merchants.
I saw her stranding with her raft.
He's a farmer and behaves a little better than his cousin.
An unpleasant person.
His healing powers equal mine.
I think she's under bad influence.
That's my name.
She's actually quite nice.
She's a druid. Since she started selling health potions, people visit me only rarely. Which is a good thing, but of course I'll help if I'm needed.
The oracle will lead you to your {destiny} once you are level 8.
I think that guy is new. He's a {bank} clerk.
He has some inner devils that torture him.
Tom is the local tanner. That means he always needs fresh corpses or leather.
A man of the sword.

messages.greet: Nature's blessing, traveler!
Hello |PLAYERNAME|! What do you need? If it's {food}, you've come to the right place.
messages.sendtrade: Yep, take a good look.

keywords.response: I offer quite a lot of food. Ask me for a {trade} if you're hungry

Imbuement Assistant.name: Imbuement Assistant
voices: Hello adventurer, looking for Imbuement items? Just ask me!

messages.greet: Hello |PLAYERNAME|, say {imbuement packages} or {trade} for buy imbuement items.
messages.walkaway: See you later |PLAYERNAME| come back soon.
messages.farewell: See you later |PLAYERNAME| come back soon.

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to the
I can bring you either to the {east} end of Port Hope or to the {centre} of the town, where would you like to go?

Inigo.name: Inigo
voices: I know the ways and lays of Dawnport. Talk to me if you want to know more!
Troll hair, wolf fur, lumps of dirt - bring them to me!
Come to me if you need help!
Hey there, young adventurer! Need a hint?
You came through the portal? Talk to me!
You're going out? Make sure you have a rope with you!
Buying all sorts of creature products!
You're looking thoughtful. Maybe I can help you?

keywords.response: Sorcerers are elemental magicians. They have mastered fire, energy and death magic.

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free or you want the {adventurer stone}?
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: I guess you couldn't convince Gamon to give you a stake, eh?
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
You should visit Tibra in the Carlin church now.
You already received my line of the prayer.

The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.

messages.greet: Welcome to the house of fashion, |PLAYERNAME|!
Be mourned, pilgrim in flesh. Are you looking for a promotion?

keywords.response: Do you want to be promoted in your vocation for 20000 gold?

messages.greet: Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|. Which of my fine gems do you {need}?

keywords.response: I am a jeweller. Maybe you want to have a look at my wonderful {offers}.
Well, I sell gems and {goblets}. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Ah, our newest import! We have golden goblets, silver goblets and bronze goblets. All of them have space for a hand-written dedication.

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
I think you have forgotten to bring your stake, kid.
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
You should visit Amanda in Edron now, kid.
You already received my line of the prayer.
A blessed stake? That's a strange request. Maybe Quentin knows more, he is one of the oldest monks after all.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.
