voices: Welcome to the post office!
If you need help with letters or parcels, just ask me. I can explain everything.
Hey, send a letter to your friend now and then. Keep in touch, you know.

messages.greet: Hello. How may I help you |PLAYERNAME|? Ask me for a {trade} if you want to buy something. I can also explain the {mail} system.
messages.farewell: It was a pleasure to help you, |PLAYERNAME|.

Nipuna.name: Nipuna
voices: I'm selling magic equipment. Come and have a look.
If you need runes, this is the market stall for you!

messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: You are....kind of tall! Hello.
Ah, another diciple of the extreme... surviving the icy outdoors? Let me {help}! If you need some first aid out here, I can provide {healing} or grant you an {enhanced} blessing!

keywords.response: I am able to grant you the heart of the mountain's blessing. But I must ask of you to sacrifice |BLESSCOST| gold. Are you willing to part with that amount of wealth?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Besides the {enhanced} blessing available from me, I know of one other, granted by a solitary {nomad} far west of Svargrond. There are also five different other blessings available, each in a sacred place. ...\nThese blessings are: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}.
Well, as I am quite in a {fix} currently, my only hope to escape this situation may be to grant you {healing} or an {enhanced} blessing if you wish. You must desire SOMETHING, right? Sure you do.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.

I know of a mysterious djinn, bound to an existence of slavery far to the north of Tiquanda's jungles. He is bound to tell you his secrets and offer you the 'blood of the mountain'. ...\nI do not know where exactly but I guess you must first dig that one out to actually talk to him.
I am one with nature, one with the ice and the cold. Names are of no worth out here. Out here, you face isolation and loneliness. Only your strength, willpower and {training} can keep you alive.

My life is one of hardship, hardship I chose freely. Endurance, strength and the power of the will are my only companions in this frigid wilderness. My strength comes from disciplined training and knowledge of the outdoors.

Noodles.name: Noodles
voices: Grrrrrrr.
<wiggles>
<sniff>
Woof! Woof!
Wooof!

messages.greet: <sniff> Woof! <sniff>
Hm? Oh! Oh, yes a... visitor! Intruder? Benefactor...? Wha- what are you? If you want to pass through this cave, I may have to disappoint you. Or maybe not. It... depends. So, just passing through?
Psst, not that {loud}.
Welcome, pilgrim. How may I {help} you? Are you in need of {healing}?

keywords.response: Here in the whiteflower temple you may receive the blessing of spiritual shielding. But we must ask of you to sacrifice |BLESSCOST| gold. Are you still interested?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

Norma.name: Norma
voices: Great drinks and snacks at fair prices!
You know you want a party after all that tiring hunting!
<sings> ... are a girl's best friieeend...
Sing and dance at my bar! Yeah!
Best place in town! Come to my bar!

messages.walkaway: Hey, where are you going? We've just started!
messages.sendtrade: Take all the time you need to decide what you want!
messages.greet: Welcome, welcome! Have a seat! If you like a drink or something to eat, just ask me for a {trade}!

keywords.response: Well, my name is {Norma}.
I used to be a merchant, but being a barkeeper is so much more fun. It's been my dream since I was a little girl.
It's about |TIME|. Time just flies, doesn't it?
To view the offers of a merchant, simply talk to him or her and ask for a {trade}. They will gladly show you their offers and also the things they buy from you.
I've never been better! I love my new {job}!
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Obi} or {Lee'Delle} if you need a weapon.
As an adventurer, you should always have at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
Ah, the monsters are far away. Let's party now!
If you really want to talk about dungeons, visit Dallheim on the bridge near my bar.
Ewww, I don't even want to think about the smell from the sewers right now!
Oooh, I wouldn't dare gossiping about the king. He might have his spies here somewhere, you know.
This is the world we live in, oh-oh-oh, and these are the hands we're given, oh-oh... oh, I'm sorry, I got carried away!
As a premium adventurer you have many advantages, you should check them out!
I serve the best drinks in town! What's it gonna be, lemonade? Wine? Milk? Beer? Just ask me for a {trade}!
The temple is a good place to visit if you're in urgent need for healing.
Well, the only help I could give you are some general {hints}. And a delicious {drink} along with it.
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle} if you need equipment.
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Dixi} or {Lee'Delle} if you need equipment.
Oh, would you like something to eat or drink? Ask me for a {trade} to see my offers!
<gets a dreamy look in her eyes>
Al Dee treats his customers friendly, but he's badmouthing them once he had a few beers.
I'm curious about her adventures. She really should come here more often!
He got lucky when Willie and him played a game of dice about who gets to farm on which side of the river. Ever since, Willie holds a grudge against him.
Hehe, that guy doesn't pretend to be anyone that he isn't. He is what he is - rude, but honest.
Oh shush! It's kinda disgusting when he walks in here with animal blood on his hands!
What Seymour doesn't teach you is how much fun you can have here!
I invited her to my bar, but she refused. Oh well, it was worth a try!
I think that poor guy never gets a break from work. At least he never comes here.
That guy seriously needs some partying and a girlfriend.
The oracle is on the top floor of the academy. You should go there once you are level 8 to leave this island.
I think it's rather strange that he lives here with his granddaughter. No one's ever seen the parents of {Dixi}.
I hate that name, it sounds so boring. Almost like 'normal'. I think I should change my name to something more exciting. Like... Marylin! Oh, what a glamorous sound!
She told me that she dreams of leaving this island to go on a big adventure.
They tell me strange stories about him and some monsters in a hole. Weird!
That girl thinks that she is soooo special and 'high society'. We used to be friends, but well, things change.
That's probably someone I'll never see in my bar.
<giggles> That monk with his holier-than-thou attitude hasn't anything against a good mug of wine now and then.
If you listen to him, you could get the impression my little bar is the devil himself. He says he has more work now keeping drunken adventurers in than monsters out of the city. Such an exaggeration!

messages.greet: It's .. It's YOU! At last!! So what's this special proposal you would like to make, my friend?
Welcome to Carlin Furniture Store, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain {type} of furniture?

keywords.response: Well, as you can see, I sell furniture. Ask me for a {trade} if you're interested to see my wares.
My name is Nydala. I run this store.
It is |TIME|. Do you need a clock for your house?

Obi.name: Obi
voices: Only quality steel and wood used for my weapons!
Buy your weapons here!
Selling and buying all sorts of weapons, come and have a look!
Give those monsters a good whipping with my weapons!

messages.farewell: Farewell, I hope you were satisfied with our service.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares.
messages.greet: Hello, hello, |PLAYERNAME|! Please come in, look, and buy! If you like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}!

keywords.response: Well, how can I help you? Do you need some general {hints}? Or, if you're interested in a {trade}, just ask.
What kind of information do you need? I could tell you about different topics such as {equipment}, {monsters} or {Rookgaard} in general.
{Al Dee} sells torches.
Be careful down there! Make sure you bought enough {torches} and a {rope} or you might get lost.
The king encouraged salesmen to travel here, but only I dared to take the risk, and a risk it was!
It's about |TIME|. Yes, |TIME|. I'm so sorry, I have no watches for sale.
My name is Obi, just Obi, the honest merchant. If you like to {trade}, just ask.
I'm a merchant and the local {weapon} smith. If you like to see my quality wares or sell weapons to me, ask me for a {trade}.
As an adventurer you should always have at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
If I were you, I'd invest my money in quality steel rather than putting it in a so-called safe bank account!
Well, the mainland also consists of several continents. You can go there once you are level 8 and have talked to the {oracle}.
Ah, Rookgaard. Home sweet home, that's what it became for me, but I will always miss {Thais} and {Sam}.
Oh, Thais, I'll be back. One day, I'll be back.
My good old cousin Sam. Oh, how I miss him.
I think good practice is better than reading a boring book. Of course, you will need proper {equipment} to be able to get practice!
told them to let me sell food, but no! Sorry, you have to ask {Willie} or {Billy} on the farms west of here.
Good monsters to start with are rats. They live in the {sewers} under the village of {Rookgaard}.
There are many sewer entrances throughout Rookgaard. One is right outside this shop and to the left. For more details about monsters and dungeons, best talk to one of the {guards}.
The bridge guard {Dallheim} is north of here, just follow the street, you can't miss it.
Sadly, not many merchants are as honest as I am.
I wish I could help you with that, but no, I was told to stick to weapons. Go see {Lily}.
There are many blueberry bushes in and around this village. Nature's for free.
I'm fine. It's a little hot near the crucible, but I enjoy the sound of forging {weapons}.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see which things I buy from you.
Oh, just upstairs. My granddaughter {Dixi} is in charge of selling armors and shields.
Yes, I'm selling weapons. Just ask me for a {trade} to see my offers and the things I buy from you.
Well, no gold, no deal. Earn gold by fighting {monsters} and picking up the things they carry. Sell it to {merchants} to make profit!
I wish I could help you with that, but no, I was told to stick to weapons. Go see {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle}.
I sell {weapons} of all kinds. Just ask me for a {trade} if you like to see my offers.
I don't know how anyone could give up the flourishing business she led. She should have listened to me and find someone who continues that business for her.
I told him there was no danger, but he wouldn't listen to me, no one listens to me.
I suggested him opening a tourist guide company with me, Obi's and Santiago's, but he didn't approve. I really don't understand why.
An old woman shouldn't be treated like that, no way, that's bad.
Oh, this guy is so greedy, so greedy. Ripping off poor adventurers like you!
She is beautiful, very, very beautiful. I hope I can impress her somehow.
He's just like his cousin {Willie}.
This guy doesn't understand that he should entrust me with the food business, too. He really should do. Then he had time for his farm.
He shouldn't heal people for free, no he shouldn't. That would be a great source of income for the village that could be invested in enhancing the smithy.
Oh, what an endearing little girl, and she's working so hard to help me, even without receiving payment. Such a sweet little girl!
I don't like him, actually I dislike him deeply. He is so greedy that he doesn't want to share his profit he gains from health potions.
She ruins the market with her offers! This is bad for us honest merchants, really bad.
I knew it! I knew she would try to get the monopoly on potions in this village! But no one has listened to me!
The oracle, ah, such a weird being! It will lead you off this island once you are level 8, yes it will, mark my words.
I told everyone he will cause trouble. He talks people into giving him their money and putting it on the {bank}! They rather should leave it here with us honest merchants!
He is the head of the local academy. I encouraged him to sponsor you, but no one listens to Obi, no one listens to me, as usual.
Well, he just buys what no one else wants. Stuff that's long dead. I can live with that, yes, I can live with that.
What a hero, what a hero.

Oblivion.name: Oblivion
voices: Hm.
Yes. I listen, master.
I understand.
Not yet, my brothers. Wait.

messages.greet: A shadow preceded you. You wish?
Greetings, dear visitor |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to the
I can bring you either to the east end of Port Hope or to the west end of the town, where would you like to go?

messages.greet: Welcome |PLAYERNAME|! Only rarely I can welcome {visitors} these days.
messages.walkaway: Take care, it's dangerous out there.

keywords.response: I guard this humble temple as a monument for the order of the {nightmare knights}.
My name is Oldrak.
These plains are not safe for ordinary travellers. It will take heroes to survive here.
I can't help you, sorry!
The greatest necromant who ever cursed our land with the steps of his feet. He was defeated by the nightmare knights.
This ancient order was created by a circle of wise humans who were called 'The {Dreamers}'. The order became {extinct} a long time ago.
Many perished in their battles against evil, some went mad, not able to stand their nightmares any longer. Others were seduced by the darkness.
They learned the ancient art of {dreamwalking} from some elves they befriended.
While the dreamwalkers of the elves experienenced the brightest dreams of pleasure, the humans strangely had dreams of {dark omen}.
They dreamed of doom, destruction, talked to dead, tormented souls, and gained unwanted insight into the {schemes of darkness}.
They figured out how to interpret their dark dreams and so could foresee the plans of the dark gods and their minions.
Using this knowledge they formed an order to thwart these plans, and because they battled their nightmares as brave as knights, they named their order accordingly.
It is rumoured to open the entrance to the pits of inferno, also called the nightmare pits. Even if I knew about this secret I wouldn't tell you.
Before the battles raged across them, they were called the fair plains.
That's where we are. The world of Tibia.
They created Tibia and all life on it ... and unlife, too.
Beware the foul undead!
Beware the foul undead!
A weapon of myth and legend. It was lost in ancient times ... perhaps lost forever.
Yenny, known as the Gentle, was one of most powerfull magicwielders in ancient times and known throughout the world for her mercy and kindness.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
Now, it is |TIME|.

messages.greet: Hello. How may I help you |PLAYERNAME|? Ask me for a {trade} if you want to buy something. I can also explain the {mail} system.
messages.farewell: It was a pleasure to help you, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.sendtrade: Here. Don't forget that you need to buy a label too if you want to send a parcel. Always write the name of the {receiver} in the first line.

Omrabas.name: Omrabas
voices: Typical. Easy come, easy go.
He will PAY for this... They will ALL pay!
<groan>
If I ever lay hands on him again...

messages.greet: At last, a visitor! Welcome to my... humble abode. {Scroll} or {mission}?

One-Eyed Joe.name: One-Eyed Joe
voices: Did you hear that, too?

messages.greet: Hello there. I'm sorry, I hardly noticed you. I'm a bit nervous. The spooky {sounds} down there, you know
Hello, |PLAYERNAME|. You've come at a good time for our {project}.

Oressa.name: Oressa
voices: Leave all Dawnport things behind you and choose your destiny!
Come to me if you need healing!
Choose your vocation and explore the mainland!
Talk to me to choose your definite vocation! Become a knight, paladin, druid or sorcerer!
World needs brave adventurers like you. Choose your vocation and sail to the mainland!
Poisoned? Bleeding? Wounded? I can help!

keywords.response: I am Oressa Fourwinds, the {healer}.
If you are hurt my child, I will {heal} your wounds.
I can {heal} you if you are hurt. I can also help you choose your {vocation}.
Found a new way of living and took to it like a fish to water.
Ah. Some wounds never heal. <sighs> Shipwrecked in body and mind. Nowhere to go, so he doesn't leave.
He broods over problems he won't share. But maybe you can help him with a little quest or two.
He lives only for his experiments and potions
I have heard of it, yes.
In this category I have '{Bruise Bane}', '{Cure Bleeding}', '{Wound Cleansing}', '{Cure Poison}', '{Intense Wound Cleansing}', '{Recovery}' and '{Intense Recovery}'.
In this category I have '{Light}', '{Find Person}', '{Magic Rope}', '{Levitate}', '{Haste}', '{Charge}' and '{Great Light}'.

I can teach you {healing spells}, {attack spells} and {support spells}. What kind of spell do you wish to learn? You can also tell me for which level you would like to learn a spell, if you prefer that.

messages.greet: What's your business here with the {magicians}, |PLAYERNAME|?

keywords.response: I can't imagine a better place to live.
Though the city has seen better days, the quality of life is still much better than in most other cities.
Hm, good question. Maybe old, wise man?
I'm used to being called old man. Simple as that.
I don't know what you're talking about.
Yes, it's a bit messy down there. Sorry.
Doesn't ring a bell.
He rarely comes here.
A man of the seas.
He used to visit me for a chat, but ever since that new tavern opened I haven't seen him much anymore.
He sometimes delivers fruit and vegetables to this quarter.
Though the city has seen better days, the quality of life is still much better than in most other cities.
I can't imagine a better place to live
Whatever that's supposed to mean.
I don't have anything that I could give you as a reward. Guess you aren't so selfless after all, huh?
They try to protect the city and do a decent job. Well - no, a poor job, I mean a poor job.
You can bring me a mug of tea if you want to.

messages.greet: Oh, hello |PLAYERNAME|. What is it?
messages.walkaway: Good bye, and don't come back too soon.

keywords.response: I think the gods are too busy to care about us mortals, hmm... that makes me feel godlike, too.
I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent {Durin}!
I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent {Durin}!
I have a job of great responsibility, mostly I keep annoying persons away from my boss.
You better don't ask, you wouldn't like the answer.
Ah, yes, yes, hail to King {Tibianus}! Long live the king and so on...
I overheard a conversation of officials, that magic will be forbidden soon.
My name is Oswald, but let's proceed, I am a very busy man.
Hey, I am not a shopkeeper, I am an important man!
It is nearly tea time, so please hurry!
It's rumoured that Sam does not forge all weapons himself, but buys them from his cousin, who is married to a cyclops.
If you want to see dungeons just don't pay your taxes.
It's beyond all doubt that certain sinister elements in our city have certain knowledge about this myth.
You are not the first one to ask about that. Am I the only one that preferes wine to such disgusting stuff?
What do you expect from ex-soldiers? He is nuts! Hacked on the head far too often.
Isn't he the artist formerly known as the prince?
I never found any rumour concerning him, isn't that odd?
They say she killed over a dozen husbands already.
This man lives in the darkness like a rat and is also as handsome as one of them. He surely is up to no good and often consorts with sinister strangers.
Just last week a one eyed man, who had a room at Frodo's, met him in the middle of the night.
He sells his scrolls far too expensive.
I was told he lost a body part or two in duels... if you know what I mean.
He is rumoured to summon kinky demons to... well you know.
You know a rumour? TELL ME! TELL ME! TELL ME!
Fascinating! Absolutely fascinating!
I heard he was a ladies' man in younger days. In our days he is rumoured to wear women clothes now and then.
A simple shopkeeper with minor intelligence.
They say he isn't truly dead. He was... or is a necromant after all.
Some say he is Ferumbras in disguise.
What a shame. He claimed to be the king of thiefs and was caught stealing some fruit.
Just between you and me, he can be quite a tyrant.
AHHHH!!! WHERE??? WHERE???

messages.greet: Welcome to our humble guild, wanderer. May I be of any assistance to you?

keywords.response: I am the grand druid of Carlin. I am responsible for the guild, the fields, and our citizens' health.
Every druid is able to learn the numerous spells of our craft.
Sorry, I don't teach spells for your vocation.
I am Padreia, grand druid of our fine city.
Time is just a crystal pillar - the centre of creation and life.
We are druids, preservers of life. Our magic is about defence, healing, and nature.
Sorcerers are destructive. Their power lies in destruction and pain.

messages.greet: Greetings.
Salutations, |PLAYERNAME| I guess you are here for the {horses}.
Welcome to my little kingdom, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.farewell: Good bye, visit me again. I will be here, promised.
messages.walkaway: Good bye, visit me again. I will be here, promised.

keywords.response: You mean that's a JAIL? They told me it's the finest hotel in town! THAT explains the lousy roomservice!
You mean that's a JAIL? They told me it's the finest hotel in town! THAT explains the lousy roomservice!
You mean that's a JAIL? They told me it's the finest hotel in town! THAT explains the lousy roomservice!

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Greetings, young man. Looking for a passage or some fish, |PLAYERNAME|?

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to
I'm a fisherman and I take along people to Edron. You can also buy some fresh fish.
I'm a fisherman and I take along people to Edron. You can also buy some fresh fish.
My fish is of the finest quality you could find. Ask me for a trade to check for yourself.
It's a lovely and peaceful isle. Did you already visit the nice sandy beach?
My name is Pemaret, the fisherman.

messages.greet: Welcome home, " .. Player(creature):getSex() == PLAYERSEX_FEMALE and "Lady" or "Sir" .. " |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.farewell: Farewell, and may Justice be with you!
messages.walkaway: Wait... will you take me a diamond when you're back?

keywords.response: I am miss Penny, your secretary.
Yep, Penny's my name. You seem to be as smart as you're talkative.
I'm a secretary. I'm organising all those papers and your mail.
<Sigh> It's an evil world, isn't it?
<Sigh> It's an evil world, isn't it?
<Sigh> It's an evil world, isn't it?
You can get a letter from me.
Don't stare at me.

messages.greet: Be greeted |PLAYERNAME|!

Perod.name: Perod
voices: Stop by before embarking on your great adventure! Distance weapons and general equipment on sale today!

messages.greet: Hello. Unless you have official business here or want to pass the gate, please move on.

keywords.response: There it's even more smelly than in the factory quarter. Smells a bit like rotten eggs.
You don't look as if you would last one second there.
One day I will walk into the office of my superior and announce my resignment. Probably not long from now.
Good idea. Go for a walk there. Preferably six feet down.
It's too noisy and smelly.
Go there if you wanna get beaten up.
Sergeant first class of the Yalaharian Guard Force. But I don't care about ranks and titles.
I can't stand those arrogant fools.
Leave me alone with your 'mission' unless you have precise orders from my superiors.
Peter.
That quara brood should be extinguished.
The leader of their pack is the biggest criminal among them all.
Count them yourself.
You're here. So what?

messages.greet: Welcome on board, |PLAYERNAME|. Where can I {sail} you today?

keywords.response: I'm sorry but I don't sail there.
Do you seek a passage to
My boat is ready to bring you to {Venore}, {Port Hope}, {Liberty Bay}, {Yalahar}, {Gray Island}, {Ankrahmun}, {Krailos} or {Issavi}. Or to {Travora} - a place between the worlds.
I am the captain of this ship.
Where do you want to go - {Krailos}, {Venore}, {Port Hope}, {Liberty Bay}, {Ankrahmun}, {Yalahar} or {Gray Island}?
That's where we are.
It's Petros.

messages.greet: Hello, mighty adventurer |PLAYERNAME|. Can I teach you something you don't know?
messages.farewell: Go and be careful. Remember what you have learned!

keywords.response: I am fine, thank you very much.
My business is knowlegde and it is for free.
I am honored to be teacher in this school.
I run this school, there are other travelling teachers who we call Loremasters.
If you are lucky you'll meet one in your journeys.
My name is Phillip.
It is |TIME|.
I will provide you with all knowledge I have.
Monsters come in different shape and power. It's said there is a zoo in the dwarfs' town.
Dungeons are places of danger and puzzles. In some of them a bright mind will serve you more then a blade.
An interesting place you should consider to visit.
You don't have to thank me, it's only my duty.
To learn about gods, visit the temples and talk to the priests.
The southern king is called Tibianus. He and our queen Eloise are in a constant struggle.
The southern king is called Tibianus. He and our queen Eloise are in a constant struggle.
I don't like rumours.
I don't like rumours.
I don't like rumours.
To learn about weapons read appropriate books or talk to the smiths.
To learn about magic talk to the guild leaders.
Rebellion? What for? We are contend with our situation.
Tod will come and save us all. He will bring freedom and beer to the men of Carlin.
This servant of evil is protected by the dark gods and can't be harmed.
He is a follower of evil. His powers were boosted by a sinister force and he is beyond human restrictions now.
This weapon is said to be very powerful and unique. It was hidden in ancient times and now is thought to be lost.

messages.greet: Oink.

Pino.name: Pino
voices: Feel the wind in your hair during one of my carpet rides!

messages.greet: Greetings, traveller |PLAYERNAME|. Where do you want me to {fly} you?

keywords.response: Never heard about a place like this.
Do you seek a ride to
I can fly you to {Darashia}, {Issavi}, {Svargrond}, {Kazordoon}, {Zao}, {Femor Hills} or to {Marapur} if you like. Where do you want to go?

Plunderpurse.name: Plunderpurse
voices: Waste not, want not!
Don't burden yourself with too much cash - store it here!
Don't take the money and run - deposit it and walk instead!

keywords.response: You can deposit and withdraw money from your bank account here.
Abram Plunderpurse, at your service. <bows>
Arrr. Not a very profitable place.
There's a choice of four: knight, sorcerer, paladin or druid.
I'm afraid this service is not available to you until you reach the World mainland.
Not my line of trade, friend! Mr Morris next door will tell you what needs doin' around here.
Arrr. We go wayyyy back, Keeran an' me. Best you ask him, I'm no good at details.

messages.greet: Hello.
messages.farewell: It was a pleasure to help you, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.sendtrade: Keep in mind you won't find better offers here. Just browse through my wares.

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

Prisoner.name: Prisoner
voices: Ahhhh!
Have mercy!
I admit! I admit!
I repent!
Noooooo!
Please! I beg you to stop!
Take it away! Please!

messages.greet: Yeah, another fool {disturbing} me, what a joy.
Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|! Do you feel adventurous? Do you want a weekly {ticket} for the ore wagon system here? You can use it right here to get to the centre of Kazordoon!
Be greeted |PLAYERNAME|! I can smell the scent of a phoenix on you!
messages.farewell: May the fire in your heart never die, |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.walkaway: May the fire in your heart never die.

keywords.response: The Spark of the Phoenix is given by me and by the great geomancer of the local earth temple. Do you wish to receive my part of the Spark of the Phoenix for |BLESSCOST| gold?
The ways of the gods are imprehensible to mortals. On the other hand, the elements are raw forces and can be understood and tamed.
I am the head pyromancer of Kazordoon.
My name is Pydar Firefist, Son of Fire, from the Savage Axes.
Ask around. There's a lot to do, jawoll.
That is our world.
It's the fourth age of the yellow flame.
May the great flame devour them all!
Life feeds on fire and ultimately fire will feed on life.
A weapon too powerful to be wielded by mortals. It has to be returned to the fire which gave birth to it.
If he ever dares enter Kazordoon I will gladly dump him into the lava. Tthe sacred flame shall bring justice upon him.
Our city was founded in ancient times. Abandoned by the gods we once fought for, we created a secure haven for our people.
This mountain is said to be the oldest in the world. It is the place where fire and earth meet and separate at the same time.
Bezil and Nezil are buying and selling equipment of all kinds.
Bezil and Nezil are buying and selling equipment of all kinds.
She is the first knight of Kazordoon. She is responsible for teaching our young warriors how to handle an axe.
Etzel is a true master of the elements. He is a role-model for our youngsters, jawoll.
He and his wife are running the Jolly Axeman tavern.
He is a smith. If you are looking for exquisite weapons and armour just talk to him.
She and her husband are running the Jolly Axeman tavern.
Uzgod is a weaponsmith just like those in the old legends.
Though we are through with the so-called gods, Durin, the first dwarf to aquire divine powers of his own, is considered a protector of our race.
Unlike the gods, the elements don't use mortals as toys, A skilled mind can understand and even control them to some extent.
The ways of the gods are imprehensible to mortals. On the other hand, the elements are raw forces and can be understood and tamed.
You can receive the Spiritual Shielding in the Whiteflower Temple south of Thais.
Ask for the Fire of the Suns in the Suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the Embrace of Tibia.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes.
I'm the head pyromancer of Kazordoon. I guess you are here for healing or looking for a blessing.

There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}.
We are the keepers and shepherds of the elemental force of {fire}.

messages.greet: I {AWAITED} YOU!
messages.farewell: COME BACK ANYTIME AND BRING ME TREASURES.
messages.walkaway: COME BACK ANYTIME AND BRING ME TREASURES.

keywords.response: LIKE MY TREASURE? WANNA PICK SOMETHING OUT OF IT?
I GRANT YOU ACCESS TO THE DUNGEON IN THE NORTH. YOU'LL FIND SOME OF MY LIVING BROTHERS THERE....BUT.....EVERY TIME YOU WANT TO ENTER YOU HAVE TO GIVE ME SOMETHING PRECIOUS. ALRIGHT?
YOU LITTLE MAGGOT. COME BACK TO ME WHEN YOU CAN HANDLE A FIGHT AGAINST MY KIND.
I HAVE A MISSION FOR YOU BUT YOU NEED TO DIE FIRST AND RETURN AS AN {UNDEAD} CREATURE. COME BACK TO ME WHEN YOU ACHIEVED THIS GOAL.
EVERYTHING YOU CARRY WITH YOU CAN ALSO BE FOUND IN MY {TREASURE}. BRING ME SOMETHING I DON'T OWN!!!
I HAVE A MISSION FOR YOU BUT YOU NEED TO DIE FIRST AND RETURN AS AN {UNDEAD} CREATURE. COME BACK TO ME WHEN YOU ACHIEVED THIS GOAL.
BOON AND BANE. I HAVE CHOSEN THIS LIFE VOLUNTARILLY AND I NEVER REGRET IT. MY {TREASURE} IS GROWING BIGGER EACH DAY.

messages.greet: Hi!

keywords.response: I can promote you for 20000 gold coins. Do you want me to promote you?
I remember about those uniforms, they had a camouflage inlay so they could be worn the inside out too. I will send some color samples via mail to Mr. Postner.
The uniforms of our guards and soldiers are of unparraleled quality of course.
I am {Queen} Eloise. It is my duty to reign over this marvellous {city} and the {lands} of the north.
We women try to bring justice and wisdom to all, even to males.
I am Queen Eloise. For you it's 'My Queen' or 'Your Majesty', of course.
I don't care about gossip like a simpleminded male would do.
Soon the whole land will be ruled by women at last!
Thank you, I'm fine.
It's my humble domain.
Sell? Your question shows that you are a typical member of your gender!
We honor the gods of good in our fair city, especially Crunor, of course.
All citizens of Carlin are my subjects. I see them more as my childs, though, epecially the male population.
This beast scared my cat away on my last diplomatic mission in this filthy town.
He is the scourge of the whole continent!
The royal treasure is hidden beyond the grasps of any thieves by magical means.
Go and hunt them! For queen and country!
Visit the church or the townguards for help.
I will call for heroes as soon as the need arises again.
Our city is rich and prospering.
I don't want to talk about 'sewers'.
Dungeons are places where males crawl around and look for trouble.
Feel free to visit our town's magnificent shops.
Don't worry about time in the presence of your Queen.
We need the assistance of heroes now and then. Even males prove useful now and then.
The taxes in Carlin are not high, more a symbol than a sacrifice.
I am the Queen, the only rightful ruler on the continent!
Ask one of the soldiers about that.
Our enemies are numerous. We have to fight vile monsters and have to watch this silly king in the south carefully.
They dare to reject my reign over them!
Isn't our city marvellous? Have you noticed the lovely gardens on the roofs?
My subjects maintain many fine shops. Go and have a look at their wares.
Ask around about them.
The four major guilds are the Knights, the Paladins, the Druids, and the Sorcerers.
They haven't troubled our city lately. I guess, they fear the wrath of our druids.
The paladins are great hunters.
It's a shame that the High Paladin does not reside in Carlin.
The knights of Carlin are the bravest.
The sorcerers have a small isle for their guild. So if they blow something up it does not burn the whole city to ruins.
The druids of Carlin are our protectors and advisors. Their powers provide us with wealth and food.
Carlin is a center of the forces of good, of course.
The forces of evil have a firm grip on this puny city to the south.
The order, Crunor gives the world, is essential for survival.
Chaos is common in the southern regions, where they allow a man to reign over a realm.
A mans tale ... that means 'nonsense', of course.
If you want a reward, go and bring me something this silly King Tibianus wants dearly!
A dusgusting organisation, which could be only created by men.
It is said that he lives on a small island near Edron. Maybe the people there know more about him.

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free or you want the {adventurer stone}?
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: I guess you couldn't convince Gamon to give you a stake, eh?
Ah, I see you brought a stake with you. Are you ready to receive my line of the prayer then?
You should visit Tibra in the Carlin church now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?

messages.greet: Ah, a customer! Please feel free to browse my wares, |PLAYERNAME|.
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. But perhaps you just want to see my " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Welcome |PLAYERNAME|! Whats your need?
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

keywords.response: Okay, then just browse through all of my wares.

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

keywords.response: Are you here to get a task or to report you finished task?
Me humble name is Rafzan. Good old goblin name meaning honest, generous and nice person, I swear!
Most goblins so afraid of everything, that they fight everything. Me different. Me just want trade.
You humans are so big, strong, clever and beautiful. Me really feel little and green beside you. Must be sooo fun to be human. You surely always make profit!
To be honest to me human friend, me only heard about it, never seen one. I imagine it's something cute and cuddly.
Swamp is horrible. Slowly eating away at health of poor little goblin. No profit here at all. Me will die poor and desperate, probably eaten by giant mosquitoes.
Beardmen are nasty. Always want to kill little goblin. No trade at all. Not good, not good.

So much to do, so little help. Me poor goblin desperately needs help. Me have a few tasks me need to be done. I can offer you all money I made if you only help me a little with stuff which is easy to strong smart human but impossible for poor, little me.

Me heard Thais is big city with king! Must be strong and clever, to become chief of all humans. Me cannot imagine how many people you have to beat up to become king of all humans. Surely he makes lot of profit in his pretty city.

They are mean and cruel. Humble goblin rarely trades with them. They would rather kill poor me if not too greedy for stuff only me can get them. Still, they rob me of it for a few spare coins and there is noooo profit for poor goblin.

Me job merchant is. Me trade with all kinds of things. Me not good trader though, so you get everything incredibly cheap! You might think me mad, but please don't rip off poor goblin too much. Me has four or five wives and dozens of kids to feed!

Humans so clever. Much, much smarter than poor, stupid goblin. They have big rich town. Goblin lives here poor and hungry. Me so impressed by you strong and smart humans. So much to learn from you. Poor goblin only sees pretty city from afar. Poor goblin too afraid to go there.

Me have seen a gold coin once or twice. So bright and shiny it hurt me poor eyes. You surely are incredibly rich human who has even three or four coins at once! Perhaps you want to exchange them for some things me offer? Just don't rob me too much, me little stupid goblin, have no idea what stuff is worth... you look honest, you surely pay fair price like I ask and tell if it's too cheap.

Rahkem.name: Rahkem
voices: Please, not so loud, not so loud. Some of us are trying to rest in peace here.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.

I think you have forgotten to bring your stake, pilgrim.
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
You should visit Brewster in Port Hope now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
A blessed stake? That is a strange request. Maybe Quentin knows more, he is one of the oldest monks after all.

Rapanaio.name: Rapanaio
voices: Passage to {Kazordoon}.

messages.greet: Welcome on board, |PLAYERNAME|. I can travel you to {kazordoon}.
messages.farewell: Good bye. Recommend us if you were satisfied with our service.

keywords.response: Do you seek a passage to
My name is Rapanaio from the Royal Tibia Line.
I am the captain of this sailing-ship.

messages.greet: Ah, a customer! Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.farewell: Farewell, |PLAYERNAME|, may the winds guide your way.
messages.sendtrade: Take all the time you need to decide what you want!

keywords.response: I am a travelling trader. I don't buy everything, though. And not from everyone, for that matter.
I am Rashid, son of the desert.
Of course, old friend. You can also browse only armor, legs, shields, helmets, boots, weapons, enchanted weapons, jewelry or miscellaneous stuff.
Elves... I don't really trust them. All this talk about nature and flowers and treehugging... I'm sure there's some wicked scheme behind all this.
My beloved hometown! Ah, the sweet scent of the desert sands, the perfect shape of the pyramids... stunningly beautiful.
I have to go to Carlin once in a while, since the queen wishes to see my exclusive wares in regular intervals.
Cormaya? Not a good place to make business, it's way too far and small.
It's not the real thing, but almost as good. The merchants there claim ridiculous prices, which is fine for my own business.
Ah yes, Edron! Such a lovely and quiet island! I usually make some nice business there.
Too few customers there, it's not worth the trip.
Um... I don't think so.
I don't like being underground much. I also tend to get lost in these labyrinthine dwarven tunnels, so I rather avoid them.
When you avoid the slums, it's a really pretty city. Almost as pretty as the governor's daughter.
Um... I don't think so.
I like the settlement itself, but I don't set my foot into the jungle. Have you seen the size of these centipedes??
Um... I don't think so.
I wish it was a little bit warmer there, but with a good mug of barbarian mead in your tummy everything gets a lot cosier.
I feel uncomfortable and rather unsafe in Thais, so I don't really travel there.
Um... I don't think so.
Although it's the flourishing trade centre of Tibia, I don't like going there. Too much competition for my taste.
It's almost time to journey on.
Kings, queens, emperors and kaliphs... everyone claims to be different and unique, but actually it's the same thing everywhere.

messages.greet: Meep? I mean - hello! Sorry, |PLAYERNAME|... Being a {rat} has kind of grown on me.

keywords.response: Your power of observation is stunning. Yes, I'm a rat.

messages.greet: Be greeted. Is there anything I can {do for you}?
Greetings |PLAYERNAME|. What leads you to me?

Red Lilly.name: Red Lilly
voices: Come visit my little pawnshop! General equipment and such. Don't miss it!

messages.greet: Hello sweetie. If you need general equipment, stuff like that, let me know.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Remember that if you buy vials of oil, there's a deposit of 5 gold on the empty one.

keywords.response: Just between you and me hun, that woman is a witch. Love potions, poison, voodoo dolls to torture your neighbour. You name it, she got it.
Uh! <whispers> There are ... rumours, you know? About bloody rituals and gruesome curses ... better don't talk aloud about such issues.
Kshh!! No talks about ... the magic folk here ... This might draw their attention.
Hard to imagine that this fat man has such a pretty daughter.
Don't mention HIM in my house you fool. You call evil and mayhem upon us.
I am not dealing with food.
I won't say anything bad about such a high-born person. That's why I remain silent hun .
I run this little pawnshop, hun, but I think you knew that already.
What interest could a king have in this little settlement? If a king cares about us, there must be something important behind all this.
Liberty comes, liberty goes, only the bay stays. Hehe.
I sell torches, candelabra, and oil.
That guy is a shrewd trader, sweetie. I bet even I could learn a thing or two from him.
I have shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, scrolls, watches, some lightsources, and other stuff. Just ask me for a {trade}.
Mostly, pirates are bad for business. But sometimes, they are good for business.
Sadly the workers have hardly enough money to buy something to eat and to drink. That is bad also for my business.
Ah, there is little in the world that comes close to the taste of rum.
I heard there is a fine bounty on his head. Would be a shame though to lose such a handsome man to the executioner <winks>.
Sugar lets the money flow. We depend heavily on it.
Thais might be a splendid town, but this is of no use to us here. The situation in our town gets worse with every ship full of foreigners that arrives here.
I heard Venore will soon acquire several trade monopolies that will grant them wealth for centuries.

Well, <lowers the voice to a whisper> there are several people around who know this or that about voodoo and not all of them are up to something good. Just buy some lucky charms from that old hag Charlotta to be on the safe side.
A handsome man but a bit too stiff. I think no one has ever had a chance to see him smiling.
I will pay you 5 gold for every empty vial. Ok?
Hmm, but please keep Tibia litter free.
You don't have any empty vials.

messages.greet: Hello, my friend.

Richard.name: Richard
voices: Don't forget to always have a rope with you! Buy one here, only the best quality!
Don't complain to ME when you fell down a hole without a rope to get you out! You can buy one here now!
Everything an adventurer needs!
A rope is the adventurer's best friend!
Fresh meat! Durable provisions! Ropes and shovels!

messages.greet: Hello there, mate. Here for a {trade}? My stock's just been refilled.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

keywords.response: Richard. Just Richard. Lost my surname with my past in that storm. <winks>
<shrugs> Never been, mate. Heard it's kinda cute, though.

messages.greet: |PLAYERNAME| HEHEHEHE! Another fool visits the {tower}! Excellent!
messages.farewell: HEHEHE! I knew you don't have the stomach.

keywords.response: This tower, of course, silly one. It holds my {master'}s {treasure}.
His name is none of your business
I am guarding the treasures of the tower. Only those who pass the {test} of the three sigils may pass.
I am known as the riddler. That is all you need to know.
I am the guardian of the paradox tower.
The key of this tower! You will never find it! A malicious plant spirit is guarding it!.

Robson.name: Robson
voices: <mumbles>
Just great. Getting stranded on a remote underground isle was not that bad but now I'm becoming a tourist attraction!

messages.greet: Hrmpf, I'd say welcome if I felt like lying.
Everyone on this island has gone crazy! Except for me and you, it seems. Let's {trade} like normal people would.
messages.farewell: Promise to come back sometime, will ya?
messages.walkaway: Hey! Don't leave me alone with all these lunatics!

keywords.response: Have you noticed that I'm actually the only rock on this island with a proper job? Those lazy pebbleheads! I'm proud to announce: I'm a trader
No, you got it all wrong! I said I'm stuck between a rock and a hard place!
I can help you buy trading stuff with you. Good for me, good for you. It's a win-win!
Have you noticed that I'm actually the only rock on this island with a proper job? Those lazy pebbleheads! I'm proud to announce: I'm a trader

messages.greet: Welcome, this is the {Gray Beach temple}, |PLAYERNAME|. Whether you are wounded, poisoned - or wait, don't tell me - yes, this is probably a case of being more emotionally hurt, I will do my best to {heal} you.

messages.greet: Hello, my name is Saideh. Once this was the entry to the crypt of our heroes. One of the graves belongs to our beloved hero Dayyan. Nowadays it is not a good idea to visit this place.

What have I become? What is slime if it's not for everyone?
Slime! Everywhere! SLIME TIME! Or... not?

messages.greet: ...er... hello? Yes...? Well, if... if you have any questions - I am not even here.

keywords.response: I AM THE... I mean... I am - what is a mage, if he is not {mad}? If he isn't... raging? I am... I am just sane. A sane mage.
I am not mad... I- YES, that's the whole problem, isn't it? What's going on, what's happening to me? I don't even know anymore.
Yes, well... I'm taking a break. It will take some time. I don't know how long I just... I want to get away from all this for some time, that's it.
Slime is my mission. Is there anything more important? There isn't. To me. Right now at least.
Slime is my mission. Is there anything more important? There isn't. To me. Right now at least.
You want to help me? HELP me? You? Who... who are you anyway? Ah nevermind.

Don't be shy, can't hurt to greet me with 'hello' or 'hi'!

{Slime}. Dangerous. We. Have. It. Under. Control. ... We. Will. Stand. {Sentry}.

Seymour.name: Seymour
voices: Newcomers - visit me! I'll answer your questions!
Get some training in the academy!
Feeling lost? Ask me for help!
Gain some knowledge in the academy!

messages.walkaway: Good bye! And remember: No running up and down in the academy!

keywords.response: Have you brought a dead rat to me to pick up your reward?
Do you have a suitable present box for me?
Well, I would like to send our king a little present but I do not have a suitable box. If you find a nice box, please bring it to me.
You are pretty inexperienced. I think killing rats is a suitable challenge for you. For each fresh {dead rat} I will give you two shiny coins of gold.
For this remark I will wash your mouth with soap, young lady!
For this remark I will wash your mouth with soap, young man!
This is an island with {vocation} teachers. You can learn all about the different vocations there once you are level 8.
It's |TIME|, so you are late. Hurry!
My name is Seymour, but for you I am 'Sir' Seymour.
At least you know how to address a man of my importance.
I'm the master of this fine {academy}, giving {lessons} to my students.
Oh, which lesson did you want to attend again? Was it {Rookgaard}, {fighting}, {equipment}, {citizens}, the {academy} or the {oracle}?
In a bank you can deposit your earned gold coins safely. Just go downstairs to {Paulie} and ask him to {deposit} your money.
Yes, depositing your money will keep it safe, so it is a good idea to store it in the bank. Of course, you can always withdraw it again.
Well, the {king} doesn't send troops anymore, the {academy} is dreadfully low on money, and the end of the world is pretty nigh. Apart from that I'm reasonably fine, I suppose.
Most of the citizens here are {merchants}. You can give me the name of any non-player character and I will tell you something about him or her.
Merchants buy and sell goods. Just ask them for a {trade} to see what they offer or buy from you.
Trolls are quite nasty monsters which you shouldn't face before level 3 or 4 depending on your {equipment}. Ask the bridge {guards} for their locations!
The guards {Dallheim} and {Zerbrus} protect our village from {monsters} trying to enter. They also mark useful {dungeon} locations on your map.
There are four vocations: {knights}, {paladins}, {sorcerers} and {druids}. You can choose your vocation once you are level 8 and have talked to the {oracle}.
Sorcerers are talented elemental magicians. You will learn all about them once you are level 8 and reached the Island of {Destiny}.
Knights are strong melee fighters. You will learn all about them once you are level 8 and reached the Island of {Destiny}.
Druids are nature magic users and great healers. You will learn all about them once you are level 8 and reached the Island of {Destiny}.
Paladins are swift distance fighters. You will learn all about them once you are level 8 and reached the Island of {Destiny}.
We have a {weapon} and an {armor} shop south of the academy. {Equipment} such as {ropes} are sold to the north-west. {Potions} can be bought to the south. And then there are the {farms}.
The world of Tibia is very large with tons of places to explore. Vast deserts, Caribbean islands, deep jungles, green meadows and jagged mountains await you!
The temple is the place to go when you are very low on {health} or poisoned. Ask {Cipfried} for a heal - he usually notices emergencies by himself.
Your current health is shown by the red bar on the right side. {Death} awaits you if it goes down to zero.
Dying in Tibia is painful, so try to avoid it. You will lose part of your {experience} points and also equipment. Make sure your {health} always stays up!
You gain experience when fighting {monsters}. You can take a look at your skill window to check your progress.
Good monsters to start hunting are {rats}. They live in the {sewers} below the village.
One entrance to the sewers is south of this {academy}. Look for a sewer grate, then use it to climb down.
The academy is the building you are standing in. We have a {library}, a {bank} and the room of the {oracle}.
There are many books in the bookcases around you, unless some naughty kids stole them again. Read them for more and detailed information.
Don't go hunting without proper equipment. You need at least a suitable {weapon}, {armor}, {shield}, {rope} and {shovel}. A {torch} is also good as well as {legs}, a {helmet} and {shoes}.
Make money by killing {monsters} and picking up their {loot}. You can sell many of the things they carry.
Once a monster is dead, you can select 'Open' on the {corpse} to check what's inside. Sometimes they carry {money} or other items which you can sell to {merchants}.
You can even sell some corpses! For example, you can sell fresh dead rats to {Tom} the tanner or me. He also buys other dead creatures, just ask him for a {trade}.
You definitely need a rope to progress in dungeons, else you might end up stuck. Buy one from {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle}.
A shovel is needed to dig some {dungeon} entrances open. 'Use' it on a loose stone pile to make a hole large enough to enter.
You should not descend into dungeons without proper {equipment}. Once you are all prepared, ask the bridge {guards} for suitable {monsters}.
A torch will provide you with light in dark {dungeons}. 'Use' it to light it. You can buy them from {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle}.
Well, I could give you valuable {lessons} or some general {hints} about the game, or a small {quest} if you're interested.
The starter armor, a coat, does not protect you well. First of all, earn some money and try to get a sturdy leather armor from {Dixi}'s  or {Lee'Delle}'s shop. Simply ask for a {trade}.
The starter weapon, a club, won't get you far. You should earn some {money} and buy a better weapon such as a sabre from {Obi}'s or {Lee'Delle}'s shop. Simply ask for a {trade}.
A sturdy leather helmet is a good choice for a beginner. You can either buy it from {Dixi} and {Lee'Delle}, or, once you are strong enough, {loot} them from {trolls}.
I fear you have to buy your first shield by yourself. A wooden shield from {Dixi} or {Lee'Delle} is a good choice.
Leather boots are basic shoes which will protect you well. You can either buy them from {Dixi} and {Lee'Delle}, or, once you are strong enough, {loot} them from {trolls}.
Leather legs might be a good basic protection. You can buy them from {Dixi} or {Lee'Delle}. Or, once you are strong enough, hunt {trolls}. They sometimes carry them in their {loot}.
Many monsters, such as rabbits or deer, are excellent food providers. You can also buy food from {Willie} or {Billy}, the farmers.
Paying for your Tibia account will turn it into a premium account. This means access to more areas and functions of the game as well as other neat features.
Hail to King Tibianus! Long live our king! Not that he cares for an old veteran who is stuck on this godforsaken island...
Use a small health potion in case of emergencies to fill up around 75 health points. You can buy them at {Lily}'s shop. She also has {antidote} potions.
Some monsters poison you. To heal poison, use an antidote potion on yourself. Buy them at {Lily}'s store.
Rookgaard is the name of this {village} as well as of the whole {island}. It belongs to the kingdom of {Thais}, in our world which is called {Tibia}.
The island is separated into a {premium} side and a non-premium side. On both sides you will find {dungeons}, but the premium side tends to be a little less crowded with other players.
The city of Thais is reigned by King Tibianus. Of course, there are many other cities but you will learn about them later.
The most important places in this village are the {temple}, the different {shops}, the {academy} and the {bridges}.
There is a bridge to the north and one to the west which lead outside the village. You should only leave once you are well {equipped} and at least level 2.
You can leave for mainland once you are level 8. To do so talk to the {oracle}.
You have to fight {monsters} to train your {skills} and {level}. If you lose {health}, eat {food} to regain it or use a {potion}.
The more you fight with a weapon, the better will be your skill handling this weapon. Don't worry about that right now though, this will become important once you have a {vocation}.
Once you gained enough experience for a level, you will advance. This means - among other things - more {health} points, a faster walking speed and more strength to carry things.
The farms are west of here. You can buy and sell {food} there which you need to regain {health}.
To attack a rat, simply click on it in your battle list. Make sure that you have proper {equipment}, though! Also, I give you 2 gold coins for each {dead rat}.
I personally don't have anything to trade, but you can ask {merchants} for a trade. That will open a window where you can see their offers and the things they buy from you.
Well, I could give you valuable {lessons} or some general {hints} about the game, or a small {quest} if you're interested.
Shall I try and take a guess at your destiny?
Well, like I told you before, I really think you got that spirit of a sorcerer in you. But of course it's completely up to you!
Well, like I told you before, I really think you got that spirit of a druid in you. But of course it's completely up to you!
Well, like I told you before, I really think you got that spirit of a paladin in you. But of course it's completely up to you!
Well, like I told you before, I really think you got that spirit of a knight in you. But of course it's completely up to you!
Obi sells and buys {weapons}. You can find his shop south of the academy.
Norma has recently opened a bar here meaning she sells drinks and snacks. Nothing of importance to you, young student.
Oh, let's not talk about Loui.
A fine and helpful man. Without him, many new adventurers would be quite clueless.
This is Tom the tanner's mother. Other than that, I don't think she is of importance.
Al Dee has a general {equipment} store in the north-western part of the village. He sells useful stuff such as {ropes}.
A traveller from the {main} continent. I wonder what brought her here. No one comes here of his own free will.
Billy is {Willie}'s cousin, but he has his farm on the {premium} side of the village.
Willie is a fine farmer, although he is short-tempered. He sells and buys {food}.
A humble monk living in the {temple} south of here. He can heal you if you are wounded or poisoned.
Dixi sells and buys {armors}, {shields}, {helmets} and {legs}. You can find her shop south of the academy, just go up the stairs in {Obi}'s shop.
A mysterious druid who lives somewhere in the wilderness. He sells small health {potions} just like {Lily}.
Lee'Delle's shop is in the western part of town, on the {premium} side. She sells everything cheaper.
In the southern part of town, Lily sells {potions} which might come in handy once you are deep in a dungeon and need {health}.
The oracle is a mysterious being just upstairs. It will bring you to the {Island of Destiny} to choose your {vocation} once you are level 8.
Yes, Paulie is very important. He is the local {bank} clerk.
Sir Seymour, yes, that's me.
Tom the tanner buys fresh {corpses}, minotaur leather and paws. Always good to make some {money} if you can carry the corpses there fast enough.
He's the guard on the north {bridge} and a great fighter. He can show you {monster} locations. Just ask him about monsters!
He's the guard on the west {bridge} and a great fighter. He can show you {monster} locations. Just ask him about monsters!

I scared this bigmouth so much that he left the town by night. HO, HO, HO!
The city is is a peaceful place, and it's up to me to keep it this way.
He is the guy responsible to keep the sewers working. Someone has to do such kind of jobs. I can't handle all the garbage of the city myself.
Rowenna is one of our local smiths. When you look for weapons, look for Rowenna.

For me, he's the god of justice.

Wouldn't wonder if some males worship him secretly. HO, HO, HO!
I deal more with the human mosters, you know? HO, HO, HO!
Would certainly make a good butterknife. HO, HO, HO!
The only thing that rebels here now and then is the stomach of a male after trying to make illegal alcohol. HO, HO, HO!

messages.greet: Hello |PLAYERNAME|! You're late, do you have no concept of time? My mission is of utmost importance. If you are not interested in helping me, you might as well just leave.

keywords.response: I heard of a device which would allow man to sail the sea of light. I call it the {Lightboat}, probably the most important invention in our history. And I will not rest until I have found a way to put the plan of its inventor into action.

I heard of a device which would allow man to sail the sea of light. I call it the {Lightboat}, probably the most important invention in our history. And I will not rest until I have found a way to put the plan of its inventor into action.

I heard of a device which would allow man to sail the sea of light. I call it the {Lightboat}, probably the most important invention in our history. And I will not rest until I have found a way to put the plan of its inventor into action.
The sea of light is what I call the endless arrangement of shiny stars in the night sky. If we fail to complete the {magic device}, science will probably never uncover its secrets.

I found the cause of the initial failure. A rare component, a mirror crystal was used to store magical energy. Miscalculations within the construction damaged this fragile power source. The unleashed energy must have been devastating.

The people of Edron were digging there for minerals and gold. It seemed all that work was of no avail when they finally hit the motherlode. Gems, rare crystals and... water. So much that it flooded the whole system. And not a single soul escaped.

I heard rumours of a fabled creature whose traces were found on an island near Carlin. It lives solely to collect all kinds of rare gems, crystals and minerals. Offering an item it does not already own, reportedly allows passage into its lair.
I can't reveal much to you right now as time is of the essence. I can tell you though that the glooth plant and the whole town are in danger and we have to act to stop a {madman} and his schemes.
I defeated him there in the past. It has been abandoned for many {years}, but I suspected him to return from the dead eventually, as he has done so often before.
The creature is powerful but not very clever. It seems it can be easily {enraged} and then it would likely let slip all caution and would relentlessly attack without regard for its safety.
I used the time to prepare. You'll find my talking tubes all the {way} to his lair, and I can provide you with vital information about the things ahead.
