messages.greet: Want to go back to Yalahar? Just ask me for a free {passage}.
Greetings!
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just have a look.

messages.greet: How could I help you?
Hello. I'm so glad someone has found me. Did you meet THEM?!
Hello!

Telas Golem.name: Telas Golem
voices: What .. happened?

messages.greet: Where .. am I?
Greetings, friend. Good you are showing up.
Hey there, you are surely interested in helping the Rathleton city guard, right? Right - especially now since the dreaded minotaurs gain more ground every day.
Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

Hey |PLAYERNAME|. I'm Testserver Assistant and I can give {money}, {experience} and {blessing} which will be useful for testing on " .. configManager.getString(configKeys.SERVER_NAME) .. " server." .. " You can too to back to level 8 with {reset}.
How could you sneak up on me like this? I thought you were one of THEM! Well, since you are not, what brings you to this wilderness?
messages.walkaway: Take good care of yourself traveller. Would be a shame to lose such a courageous wanderer to those green monsters.
messages.farewell: Take good care of yourself traveller. Would be a shame to lose such a courageous wanderer to those green monsters.

messages.greet: Hi! You look like someone on a {mission}.
Be greeted, friend of the apes.

keywords.response: Me put name away name long ago. Now only blind prophet of ape people are.
Me is who in dreams speak to holy banana. Me divine the will of banana.
Me {prophet} and {guardian} is.
Me is who in dreams speak to holy banana. Me divine the will of banana.
Me guard the forbidden land behind the great palisade. If any want to enter, he must ask me for transport.
Me guard the forbidden land behind the great palisade. If any want to enter, he must ask me for transport.
Good ape he is. Has to work hard to make other apes listen but you helped a lot.

Our holy ancestor he is. Big as mountain. Lizards say they built palisade to keep him but we not believe ... We think Bong palisade built to have peace from pesky lizards. We respect peace of Bong, keep people away from forbidden land.
The lizards evil and vengeful are. Ape people on guard must be.
Our people a lot to learn have. One day we might live in peace with you hairless apes, who knows.
Me not know. Me seldom have visions of not banana related objects.
Hairless apes strange people are.

messages.greet: Welcome to my little realm.

The Crone.name: The Crone
voices: Let me mourn in peace.

messages.greet: Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|... mortal.
Be greeted, visitor.
messages.farewell: Good bye. May the gods watch over your path.

messages.greet: Greetings.
Hello, my sparring buddy. We should have another fight sometimes. I think you may have earned a little reward.

keywords.response: Times have changed <sigh>. In the past dragons were feared and respected. Only the {demons} rivalled our notoriety.
Those upstarts! I wonder why would anyone care about them. They lack our style. For them it is all about brute force and showing-off.
Breathing fire is an art! Instead of setting everything on fire, you exhale a cone of fire to give a worthy opponent a chance to avoid it.
Your lives are so short and meaningless and yet you are here! And as a race you even have your own history and remember things with the help of {books}, which amazes me.
I like the idea of books so much that I acquired a human servant to record my memoirs. You find a copy somewhere in my lair.
Lava is only fun as long as it doesn't harden - then it turns into an annoyance.

The Librarian.name: The Librarian
voices: I really have to find this scroll. Where did I put it?
Too much dust here. I should tidy up on occasion.
Someone opened the Grimoire of Flames without permission. Egregious!

messages.greet: Greetings, dear guest. If you are interested in paperware such as books or scrolls, ask me for a trade.
Ah, a customer! Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|! I buy all kinds of loot, would you like a {trade}? I can also show you my {shop options}.
messages.sendtrade: Ah, a customer! Be greeted, |PLAYERNAME|! I buy all kinds of loot, would you look at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(LootShopConfigTable) .. ".

messages.farewell: COME BACK WHEN YOU ARE PREPARED TO FACE YOUR DESTINY!
messages.walkaway: COME BACK WHEN YOU ARE PREPARED TO FACE YOUR DESTINY!

messages.greet: Harrrrk! You think you are strong now? You shall never escape my wrath! I am immortal!

keywords.response: I am Charkahn the Slayer! The immortal father of the {orcs} and master of this {hive}.
The orcs are the bearers of Blogs rage. This makes us the ultimate fighters and the most powerful of all races.
The orcs are the bearers of Blogs rage. This makes us the ultimate fighters and the most powerful of all races.
I can sense the presence and the feelings of my underlings and {minions}. I embrace the rage of the horde.
The orcish horde of this hive is under my control. I sense their emotions and their needs and provide them with the leadership they need to focus their hate and rage
Hate and rage are the true blessings of Blog, since they are powerful weapons. They give the hive strength. I provide them with direction and focus.
The Raging One blessed us with his burning hate. We are truly his children and therefore {divine}.
To conquer, to destroy and to dominate. Orcs are born to rule the {world}.
One day I will rule the world, even when turned into a {slime}.
Pah! Don't mock me, mortal! This shape is a curse which the evil {djinn} bestowed upon me!
This cursed djinn king! I set him free from an enchanted {lamp}, and he {cheated} me!
Because I freed him he granted me three wishes. He was true to his word in the first two {wishes}.
He built this fortress over Uldrek's grave within a single night. Also, he granted me my second wish and gave me immortality. Test it and try to kill me if you want. Har Har!

I wished to father more healthy and fertile children as any orc has ever done. But the djinn cheated me and made me a slime! Then he laughed at me and left for his abandoned fortress in the {Deathwish} Mountains.

His ancient fortress on Darama was deserted as the evil Djinn fled this world after his imprisonment. Now the time has come for the evil Djinns to return to their master although this will certainly awaken the {good Djinn} too.
I will not share anything more about that topic with you {paleskins}.
You are as ugly as maggots, although not quite as as tasty.
This cursed djinn king! I set him free from an enchanted lamp, and he cheated me!

The Queen Of The Banshees.name: The Queen Of The Banshees
voices: Uhhhhhh....

messages.greet: Be greeted, dear visitor. Come and {stay} ... a while.
messages.walkaway: Yes, flee from death. But know it shall be always one step behind you.

keywords.response: It's my curse to be the eternal {guardian} of this ancient {place}.
I'm the {guardian} of the {SEVENTH} and final seal. The seal to open the last door before ... but perhaps it's better to see it with your own eyes.
It served as a temple, a source of power and ... as a sender for an ancient {race} which lived a long time ago and has long been forgotten.
The race that built this edifice came to this place from the stars. They ran from an enemy even more horrible than themselves. But they carried the {seed} of their own destruction in them.
This ancient race was annihilated by its own doings, that's all I know. Aeons have passed since then, but the sheer presence of this {complex} is still defiling and desecrating this area.

Its constructors were too strange for you or even me to understand. We don't know what this ... thing they built was supposed to be good for. I feel a constant twisting and binding of souls, though, that is probably only a side-effect.
The place you know as the Ghostlands had a different name once ... and many names after. Too many to remember them all.
They are my maidens. They give me comfort in my eternal watch over the last seal.

Thorgrin.name: Thorgrin
voices: Ask me for a passage...

messages.greet: Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|! May earth protect you on the rocky grounds. If you need a {passage} back, I can help you.

keywords.response: Do you want me take you to {Cormaya}, {Kazordoon} or {Gnomprona}?

messages.greet: Hi |PLAYERNAME|.
Welcome in the name of the gods, pilgrim |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.farewell: Good bye, |PLAYERNAME|. May the gods be with you to guard and guide you, my child!

keywords.response: I think you have forgotten to bring your stake, my child.
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
You should visit Maealil in the elven settlement now, my child.
You already received my line of the prayer, dear child.
A blessed stake? That is a strange request, my child. Maybe Quentin knows more, he is one of the oldest monks after all.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.
I am a priest of the great pantheon.
The teachings of Crunor tell us to honor life and not to harm it.
It is my mission to bring the teachings of the gods to everyone.
It is my mission to bring the teachings of the gods to everyone.
My name is Tibra. Your soul tells me that you are |PLAYERNAME|.
Queen Eloise is wise to listen to the proposals of the druidic followers of Crunor.
The grace of the gods must be earned, it cannot be bought!
The world of Tibia is the creation of the gods.
Now, it is |TIME|.
There's something strange in its neighbourhood. But whom we gonna call for help if not the gods?
Remind: Not everything you call monster is evil to the core!
The mythical blade was hidden in ancient times. Its said that powerful wards protect it.
The fallen one should be mourned, not feared.
Only a man can fall as low as he did. His soul rotted away already.
The gods of good guard us and guide us, the gods of evil want to destroy us and steal our souls!
The gods we call the good ones are Fardos, Uman, the Elements, Suon, Crunor, Nornur, Bastesh, Kirok, Toth, and Banor.
Fardos is the creator. The great obsever. He is our caretaker.
Uman is the positive aspect of magic. He brings us the secrets of the arcane arts.
Air is one of the primal elemental forces, sometimes worshipped by tribal shamans.
Fire is one of the primal elemental forces, sometimes worshipped by tribal shamans.
Sula is the essence of the elemental power of water.
Suon is the lifebringing sun. He observes the creation with love.
Crunor, the great tree, is the father of all plantlife. He is a prominent god for many druids.
Nornur is the mysterious god of fate. Who knows if he is its creator or just a chronist?
Bastesh, the deep one, is the goddess of the sea and its creatures.
Kirok, the mad one, is the god of scientists and jesters.
Toth, Lord of Death, is the keeper of the souls, the guardian of the afterlife.
Banor, the heavenly warrior, is the patron of all fighters against evil. He is the gift of the gods to inspire humanity.
The gods we call the evil ones are Zathroth, Fafnar, Brog, Urgith, and the Archdemons!
Zathroth is the destructive aspect of magic. He is the deciver and the thief of souls.
Fafnar is the scorching sun. She observes the creation with hate and jealousy.
Brog, the raging one, is the great destroyer. The berserk of darkness.
The bonemaster Urgith is the lord of the undead and keeper of the damned souls.
The demons are followers of Zathroth. The cruelest are known as the ruthless seven.
I don't want to talk about that subject!

messages.greet: There, there initiate. You will now become one of us, as so many before you. One of the {Barkless}. Walk with us and you will walk tall my friend.
LONG LIVE THE KING!

keywords.response: It's my duty to protect the city.

messages.greet: Oh, hello! It's a pleasure to see a visitor from the continent.

Timur.name: Timur
voices: Equipment and general goods!
Selling ammunition and buying bows and crossbows!

messages.greet: Welcome to my little shop, adventurer! First read my blackboards.
Uhm oh hello |PLAYERNAME|... not so loud please... my {head}... What ... do you {want}?
messages.farewell: Yes, goodbye |PLAYERNAME|, just leave me alone.

keywords.response: I am... a traveler. Just leave me alone if you have nothing {interesting} to talk about.
I am... a traveler. Just leave me alone if you have nothing {interesting} to talk about.
Uhhh ohhhh one of the beers yesterday must have been bad.
My Name? I am To... ahm... hum... My name is {Hugo}.
Yes, that's my name of course.
Uh .. I... I met a Todd on the road. He told me he was traveling to Venore, look there for your Todd.
I love that city.
I never was there. Now leave me alone.
Resistance is futile... uhm... I wonder where I picked that saying up. Oh my head...
I don't know anything about money, missing or not.
He often comes here. But his constant confusion gives me a worse headache than Frodo's beer. I rather avoid him.
Uhm, never heard about him... and you can't prove otherwise.
Thats a common name, perhaps I met a William, not sure about that.

Tom.name: Tom
voices: Buying fresh corpses of rats, rabbits and wolves.
Oh yeah, I'm also interested in wolf paws and bear paws.
Also buying minotaur leather.

messages.greet: Hey there, |PLAYERNAME|. I'm Tom the tanner. If you have fresh {corpses}, leather, paws or other animal body parts, {trade} with me.
messages.sendtrade: Sure, check what I buy.

keywords.response: Alright. Can I help you with something else then?
Are you sure? I think I see some war wolf leather on you. You should reply with {yes}.
My name is Tom the tanner.
I'm the local {tanner}. I buy fresh animal {corpses}, tan them, and convert them into fine leather clothes which I then sell to {merchants}.
{Dixi} and {Lee'Delle} sell my leather clothes in their shops.
That's my job. It can be dirty at times but it provides enough income for my living.
Do I look like a tourist information centre? Go ask someone else.
Help? I will give you a few gold coins if you have some fresh dead {animals} for me. Note the word {fresh}.
Fresh means: shortly after their death.
Much to do these days.
Good monsters to start with are rats. They live in the {sewers} under the village of {Rookgaard}.
Dungeons can be dangerous without proper {equipment}.
You need at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
Sorry, I haven't been outside for a while, so I don't know.
Troll leather stinks. Can't use it.
I don't buy orcs. Their skin is too scratchy.
Are you crazy?!
Nope, sorry, don't sell that. Go see {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle}.
Nope, sorry, don't sell that. Ask {Dixi} or {Lee'Delle}.
Nope, sorry, don't sell that. Ask {Obi} or {Lee'Delle}.
I'm buying fresh {corpses} of rats, rabbits and wolves. I don't buy half-decayed ones. If you have any for sale, {trade} with me.
He's an apple polisher.
Now that's an interesting woman.
He's a better cook than his cousin {Willie}, actually.
I kinda like him. At least he says what he thinks.
Yep.
He sticks his nose too much in books.
My mother?? Did you meet my mother??
I don't have a problem with him.
Typical pencil pusher.
It's in the academy, just above Seymour. Go there once you are level 8 to leave this place.
He is such a hypocrite.
I like her beer.
She buys my fine leather clothes.
I wonder what spectacular monsters he has found.
Her nose is a little high in the air, I think. She never shakes my hand.
I wonder if he's angry because his potion monopoly fell.
I'm not what you'd call a 'believer'.
He's okay.

Tomruk The Ruddy.name: Tomruk The Ruddy
voices: Interesting reaction. Bloodcurdling. Must inspect further.
This is really sanguine!
Hmm... the conductors are too dry to transmit energy.
Ah, fresh blood. My favourite.

messages.greet: Hello hello! Always good to see fresh blood! What brings you here?

Tonar.name: Tonar
voices: I don't feel safe here ... I hope we can return to Ankrahmun soon.

messages.greet: Welcome back, Sir.

keywords.response: You are not ready yet.

Topsy.name: Topsy
voices: Runes, wands, rods, health and mana potions! Have a look!

messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Greetings! This isn't the {time} to chitchat though.

Towncryer.name: Towncryer
voices: Hear me! Hear me! The mage Wyrdin in the Edron academy is looking for brave adventurers to undertake a task!
Hear me! Hear me! The postmaster's guild has open spots for aspiring postmen! Contact Kevin Postner at the post office in the plains south of Kazordoon!
Hear me! Hear me! The inquisition is looking for daring people to fight evil! Apply at the inquisition headquarters next to the Thaian jail!

messages.greet: Welcome back, knight |PLAYERNAME|!
messages.farewell: Don't hurt yourself with that weapon, little one.

keywords.response: In this category I have '{Wound Cleansing}'' and '{Cure Poison}''.
In this category I have '{Light}', '{Find Person}' and '{Great Light}'.
I can teach you {healing spells} and {support spells}. What kind of spell do you wish to learn? You can also tell me for which level you would like to learn a spell, if you prefer that.

Turvy.name: Turvy
voices: Courageous adventurers, come buy your weapons and armors here!

messages.greet: Hello, dear |PLAYERNAME|. Can I be of any assistance? Just tell me if you'd like to {trade} weapons or armor.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my offers.

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
You don't even have that strange stake with you.
Brewster sent me a strange message about some strange hocus-pocus. I think it's nonsense, but since you have come that far, I'll play along. Are you ready?
A blessed stake? I don't believe in things like that. If anyone does, it's probably old Quentin.
I won't do that rubbish again. Go pester Chondur with your hocus-pocus.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

messages.greet: Spirits welcome you.
Greetings hero. I guess you came to {talk}.
Welcome, |PLAYERNAME|! Lovely steamboat, ain't it? I can even offer you a {passage} if you like.

keywords.response: <the dwarf quizzically raises his brow - the only destinations he accepts seems to be {Cormaya} or {Kazordoon}>

Uzon.name: Uzon
voices: Feel the wind in your hair during one of my carpet rides!

messages.greet: Daraman's blessings, traveller |PLAYERNAME|.

keywords.response: Never heard about a place like this.
I am known as Uzon Ibn Kalith.
I transport travellers to the continent of Darama for a small fee. So many want to see the wonders of the desert and learn the secrets of Darama.
I heard too many news to recall them all.
I heard too many news to recall them all.
It's 3:42 pm right now. The next flight is scheduled soon.

Valentina.name: Valentina
voices: Love is beautiful, we are loved.

messages.greet: Welcome to Valentine's Store. Let's {trade} something?
messages.farewell: Please come back from time to time.
messages.walkaway: Please come back from time to time.

keywords.response: I am known as the saleswoman of love, as a cupid.

Valindara.name: Valindara
voices: Im eager for a bath in the lake.
Im interested in shiny precious things, if you have some.
No, you cant have this cloak.

messages.greet: Greatings, mortal beigin.
messages.sendtrade: Yes, i have some potions and runes if you are interested. Or do you want to buy only potions or only runes?oh if you want sell or buy gems, your may also ask me.

messages.greet: Greetings hero. I guess you came to {talk}.

Vascalir.name: Vascalir
voices: Talk to me if you want to help protecting the village.
Rookgaard needs your help more than ever.

messages.greet: |PLAYERNAME|! You're back! And you're covered in orc blood... that can only mean... were you able to kill Kraknaknork?

keywords.response: Well, if you change your mind you know where to find me. Remember that if you help Rookgaard, Rookgaard might be able to help you.
Oh, but you have... you should say {yes}!

No worries, let's refresh your memory. To fight a monster, click on it in the battle list and you'll automatically attack it. It's as easy as that! If you want to practice, just hunt a few harmless rabbits south of here. Remember it now?
Actually I think you have killed enough. You should reply with {yes}!
What do you mean? If you're ready to {help} me again, just say so.
Well, if you change your mind, let me know.
Here, this studded armor will protect you much better. Fits you perfectly! Now - let's work on your footwear. Tom the Tanner can create great boots out of quality leather. You should pay him a visit!

Seriously, don't reject that offer. I'm going to give you a studded armor. No one refuses free stuff! If you don't like it, you can sell it - I don't need it anymore. I promise it's not too used or smelly. Want it?
Take a small break then and return to me when you have recovered... and cleaned your face.
Alright, then just let me know when you're ready. Don't take too much time though.

This brass helmet will make sure you don't hurt your head. I probably should have given that to you BEFORE you made a rocky tunnel collapse! Take your well-deserved break. Once you're ready for the next mission, talk to me again.

Seriously, don't reject that offer. I'm going to give you a brass helmet. No one refuses free stuff! If you don't like it, you can sell it - I don't need it anymore. I promise there are no fleas in it. Want it?
Let me know when you're ready. This should be fun.
Okay, then good hunting.
Well done, this bone is exactly what I needed! Great. I have to do some preparations, but as reward for your great work, I have a shiny new weapon for you. Here, would you like to have this sword?

Ah... well, if you lost that bone on the way, that's too bad. I just hope you didn't get hungry and nibbled on it. I wouldn't eat cursed flesh if I were you. Anyway, you can still have this old sword as reward, do you want it?
This sword has helped me in many fierce battles. I hope you can put it to good use. Once you're ready for the next mission, talk to me again.
Seriously, don't reject that offer. Just take that sword, it's free. If you don't like it, you can sell it - I don't need it anymore. I promise there are no blood stains on it. Want it?
Well, then just let me know when you're ready.
Oh, but there you have it in your inventory! Yeah, your backpack is a bit of a mess. I understand you overlooked it. Dig deeper!
No problem. Here's a new one. I can only give you one per hour though, so try not to lose it again this time.
Great, then please find the wasps' nest, kill one and use the empty flask on its dead body.
Well, please come back with the poison soon. We won't have much time until Kraknaknork's next attack.
Oh, but you don't carry any - did you lose the flask? I can give you a new empty one, but that will also reset your mission, meaning you have to extract new poison. Would you like that?
This brass shield is actually brand-new. It's never been used! I hope it will serve you well. Take a small break, regenerate your health, and then talk to me again for your final mission!
Seriously, don't reject that offer. Just take that shield, it's free. If you don't like it, you can sell it - I don't need it anymore. I promise it's really brand-new. Want it?
Rest for a bit, but don't take too much time to come back.
Alright. Talk to me again to continue with your mission, but heed my words!
Alright.

Vera.name: Vera
voices: Have you moved to a new home? I'm the specialist for equipping it.

messages.greet: Hey t-there, you look like someone who enjoys a good {booze}.
messages.walkaway: Oh, two t-trolls. Hellooo, wittle twolls. <hicks>

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Good hunting! I can offer you some lovely {rewards} for finishing prey hunting tasks! Furthermore I can tell you how many hunting task points (HTP) you actually {have} and you have already {spent}.
LONG LIVE THE KING!

Wentworth.name: Wentworth
voices: Waste not, want not!
Don't burden yourself with too much cash - store it here!
Don't take the money and run - deposit it and walk instead!

messages.greet: Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?

keywords.response: We can {change} money for you. You can also access your {bank account}.
We can {change} money for you. You can also access your {bank account}.
I work in this bank. I can change money for you and help you with your bank account.
I'm afraid this service is not available to you until you reach the World mainland.

Willard.name: Willard
voices: Selling weapons, ammunition and armor. Special offers only available here, have a look!

messages.greet: Greetings and Banor be with you, |PLAYERNAME|! May I interest you in a {trade} for weapons, ammunition or armor?
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. If you're only interested in {distance} equipment, let me know.

Willie.name: Willie
voices: Ah, what the heck.Make sure you know what you want before you bug me.
Buying and selling food!
Make sure you know what you want before you bug me.
You, over there! Stop sniffing around my farm! Either trade with me or leave!

messages.sendtrade: Ya take a good look.
messages.greet: Hiho |PLAYERNAME|. I hope you're here to {trade}.

keywords.response: Haven't they taught you anything at school? Ask for a {trade} if you want to trade.
Help yourself. Or ask the other {citizens}, I don't have time for that.
Fine enough.
Willie.
I'm a farmer and a cook.
I try out old and new {recipes}. You can sell all {food} to me.
I'd love to try a banana pie but I lack the {bananas}. If you get me one, I'll reward you.
Which one?
This island would be wonderful if there weren't a constant flood of newcomers.
If I were you, I'd stay here.
I know how to spell.
I'm a magician in the kitchen.
I'm not in the weapon business, so stop disturbing me.
I'm glad that we don't see many officials here.
I'm a farmer, not a preacher.
What about them? Do you live there?
I've got no time for your dungeon nonsense.
My cousin {Billy} cooks rat stew. Yuck! Can you imagine that?
Are you afraid of monsters? I bet even the sight of a {rat} would let your knees tremble. Hahaha.
Do I look like a clock?
I'm a farmer, not a preacher.
Can't stand him.
Quite a babe.
Don't ever mention his name again! He can't even {cook}!
Our little monkey.
Uhm, fine guy I think.
Boring little girl.
Overrated.
She thinks she owns this island with her underpriced offers.
I don't like hippie girls.
Leave me alone with that guy.
About time we got a bar here.
This old guy has only money on his mind.
Hopefully it gets you off this island soon so you can stop bugging me.
Uptight and correct in any situation.
If he wants to sacrifice all his free time for beginners, fine with me. Then they don't disturb me.
This joke of a man thinks he is sooo important.
Decent guy.
Yeah, so?
Overrated.
Too old to be interesting for me.
Have you found a banana for me?

messages.greet: Hi there human!

keywords.response: No part of clan. Me prefer company of precious. Or mirror image. Always nice to see pretty me!
What you on quest for? Go leave Woblin alone with {precious}

messages.greet: What? A mundane talking to me? Amusing.
Hello, what brings you here?
Greetings. Are you interested in adventures?

messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. Or do you want to look only at " .. GetFormattedShopCategoryNames(itemsTable) .. ".

messages.greet: Who are you? Are you a genius in mechanics? You don't look like one.

messages.sendtrade: At your service, just browse through my wares.

Yana.name: Yana
voices: Trading tokens! First-class equipment available!

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

keywords.response: Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
I think you have forgotten to bring your stake.
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
You should visit Isimov in the dwarven settlement now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
A blessed stake? That is a strange request. Maybe Quentin knows more, he is one of the oldest monks after all.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.

Yoem.name: Yoem
voices: Beds, chairs, tables, statues and everything you could imagine for decorating your home!

messages.greet: Hello |PLAYERNAME|! Do you need some equipment for your house?
messages.sendtrade: Have a look. Most furniture comes in handy kits. Just use them in your house to assemble the furniture. Do you want to see only a certain {type} of furniture?

keywords.response: I have {beds}, {chairs}, {containers}, {decoration}, {flowers}, {instruments}, {pillows}, {pottery}, {statues}, {tapestries} and {tables}. Which of those would you like to see?

messages.greet: How could I help you?
Not many travellerzz zzezze dayzz. I hope you bring good newzz.

Zarifan.name: Zarifan
voices: <sigh> lost... word...
<sigh> ohhhh.... memories...
The secrets... too many... sleep...
Loneliness...

messages.greet: ... ... hello...magic... words?

keywords.response: ..what about {magic}..

Zebron.name: Zebron
voices: Hey mate, up for a game of dice?

messages.greet: Greetings, high roller. So you care for a game, |PLAYERNAME|?
messages.walkaway: Hey, you can't leave. Luck is smiling on you. I can feel it!
messages.farewell: Hey, you can't leave, |PLAYERNAME|. Luck is smiling on you. I can feel it!

messages.greet: Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
messages.walkaway: Remember: If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can heal you for free.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.

Zerbrus.name: Zerbrus
voices: Are you injured or poisoned? I can help you.
For Rookgaard! For Tibia!
No monster shall go past me.
The premium side of Rookgaard lies beyond.
Want to know what monsters are good for you at your level? Just ask me!

keywords.response: Hmm, |PLAYERNAME|. I really don't know if you should go into the wilderness without a shield. You should earn some money by hunting rats under the village first until you can afford at least a wooden shield.
Zerbrus, at your service.
I'm the guard of this bridge. I defend Rookgaard against the beasts of the {wilderness} and the {dungeons}, and even of the stinking {sewers}.
My duty is eternal. Time is of no importance.
Before you fight monsters, deposit your money there. If you die, you won't lose it if it's save in the bank.
Fine.
I have to stay here, sorry. But I can {heal} you if you are wounded. I have also valuable information about {monsters}.
I'm an expert concerning the wildlife and {monsters} on this island.
I'm not a gossiper, but if you want to know something about a certain Rookgaardian, ask.
They're not that dangerous, but don't let yourself get cornered by many of them. They still can hurt.
There are two types of spiders on this island: normal spiders and poison spiders. As their name says, the latter ones can poison you which will cause a constant loss of your health. Beware of them!
Once you have upgraded your starter {equipment} a little - maybe leather stuff - and got a better weapon as well as a shield, you should be able to kill trolls.
You need a stronger weapon than the starter club to kill wolves. Maybe a {sabre} or a short {sword} will do.
The orcs have a hideout under the troll cave, just descend deep. Still, be very careful!
Minotaurs are very strong. You will need a group of people or at least level 6 and good equipment to be able to kill them.
They are a little tougher than they look like, but they're still good beginner monsters.
The skeletons on this island are usually fairly hidden. They are often found near graves and always underground. Beware of their evil life drain.
There is a bear cave close to this bridge. Be careful, though, they hit hard!
Wasp hives exist only behind the north bridge, so ask {Dallheim} for information. I'm glad there are no wasps here. They always make me jump.
Snakes can poison you, too, but their poison is usually not as dangerous as that of poison spiders. Just be careful and kill them fast.
Premium warriors pay. They gain many advantages this way.
HAIL TO THE KING!
It's north of the temple.
A place of protection. Nothing can harm you there.
I can mark you some dungeons on your map if you ask me about {monsters} suited for your level.
The sewers are crowded with {rats}. They make fine targets for young heroes.
There are {wolves}, {bears}, {snakes}, {deer}, and {spiders} in the wilderness past this bridge.
I'm a follower of {Banor}.
The heavenly warrior! Read {books} to learn about him.
You will learn about magic soon enough.
In the world of Tibia, many challenges await the brave adventurer.
There are many books in the {academy}. Theory can be just as important as practice.
It's my duty to protect this village and its {citizens}.
It looks like you have mastered the drill.
Sorry, I don't trade. Ask the shop owners for a trade instead.
I don't approve of her opening a bar. Those drunken adventurers stumbling over the bridge at nighttime are not especially helpful in improving the situation.
Such a chicken-hearted person.
He sells {weapons}. His shop is south west of town, close to the {temple}.
He dedicated his life to welcoming newcomers to this island.
She has her own problems.
There's something about this guy I don't like.
She's very attractive. Too bad my duty leaves me no time to date her.
He guards the temple and can heal you if you are badly injured or poisoned, just like me.
She's {Obi's} granddaughter and deals with {armors} and {shields}. Her shop is south west of town, close to the temple.
One of these reclusive druids.
Her shop is just north of the bridge. She really has good offers.
Gentle girl, but a little to esoteric for my taste. However, her {potions} might come in handy.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above {Seymour}. Go there when you are level 8.
The local {bank} clerk.
His job of teaching young heroes is important for the survival of all of us.
He's the local tanner. You could try selling fresh corpses or leather to him.
He does a fine job, protecting the north bridge. He's been on duty longer than me and knows the north side of Rookgaard well.
At your service.
He's a farmer. A little more friendly than his cousin {Willie}, he also buys and sells {food}.
He's quite rude. Also, he buys and sells {food}.
You are poisoned. I will help you.
You are looking really bad. Let me heal your wounds.
You aren't looking really bad. Eat some food to regain strength.

Zethra.name: Zethra
voices: Come over here if you have to resupply!

Zirella.name: Zirella
voices: I wish someone could spare a minute and help me...
This is too hard for an old woman like me.
Hello, young adventurer, you look strong enough to help me!

messages.greet: Oh, welcome back, dear Isleth Eagonst! Are you here for a little chat? Just use the highlighted {keywords} again to choose a {topic}.
messages.farewell: Good bye |PLAYERNAME|, may Uman bless you!.

Ziyad.name: Ziyad
voices: Feel the wind in your hair during one of my carpet rides!

messages.greet: Ah, the wind brings in another visitor. Welcome, dear guest. Are you looking for a {passage} with my carpet?
messages.farewell: Good bye. Recommend us if you were satisfied with our service.

keywords.response: Never heard about a place like this.
Do you seek a passage to
I can fly you to {Darashia}, to {Svargrond}, to {Kazordoon}, to {Zao}, to the {Femor Hills}, to {Edron} or to {Issavi} if you like. Where do you want to go?

I can fly you to {Darashia}, to {Svargrond}, to {Kazordoon}, to {Zao}, to the {Femor Hills}, to {Edron} or to {Issavi} if you like. Where do you want to go?
I can fly you to {Darashia}, to {Svargrond}, to {Kazordoon}, to {Zao}, to the {Femor Hills}, to {Edron} or to {Issavi} if you like. Where do you want to go?
I can fly you to {Darashia}, to {Svargrond}, to {Kazordoon}, to {Zao}, to the {Femor Hills}, to {Edron} or to {Issavi} if you like. Where do you want to go?

messages.greet: Ah our human {alliez} have finally arrived! I've already feared zat ze emperor'z forzez had caught you. Your rezilienze and prowezz are imprezzive.
Yes? What may I do for you, |PLAYERNAME|? Bank business, perhaps?
Welcome |PLAYERNAME|, student of the arcane arts. I teach the fiercest {spells} available.
Oh, please come in, |PLAYERNAME|. What can I do for you? If you need adventure equipment, ask me for a {trade}.
messages.sendtrade: Of course, just browse through my wares. {Footballs} have to be purchased separately.

keywords.response: I sell equipment for your adventure! Just ask me for a {trade} to see my wares.

messages.greet: Be greeted my .. {guezt}.
Another visitor to this constricted, cosy, calm realm, perfect except for an {exit}. Muhaha.

keywords.response: I wait. I wait for someone like you to come here. I wait for them to grow disconsolate. I wait for them to despair. And I wait for them to die. Muhahaha.
I am Zumtah, Zumtah the impeccable, Zumtah the marvellous, Zumtah the... the... eternal.
The land you are currently dwelling in, human. Don't you have any sense of your surroundings?
I have seen many of them. I have seen many of them die. In here, with me. Perhaps you will be pleased to meet them. Not long and you will join their ranks. Muhaha.
Pesky creatures. Many of them have been brought here, many of them died here. Humans, lizards, beasts, they all die the same. Down here, with me. Muhahaha.
What? What do you mean by that?
Hmm, an old one. I don't care much about politics or power, as here, he has none. Here, only I have power. Muhaha.
What are you talking about, such things do not matter down here. Down here alone, isolated and broken. Muhaha.

messages.greet: Hmh. Tread carefully around here, some of these plants are way older than you.
messages.farewell: Careful around the gardens! I do not want to repeat myself.

keywords.response: The valley is rich in vegetation. Bursting of fragrance and colour in the spring and summer, it truly is a sight to behold. You need an eye and a nose for things like this, of course.
My name is Chesa, I greet you.
The valley of the Merudri has been our home for a long time. There have been guardians around here since I remember. I always wanted to become one of them and here I am.
Indeed, we are Merudri. You are now in the centre of our sacred sanctuary and ancestral home, the Blue Valley.
The valley is rich in vegetation. Bursting of fragrance and colour in the spring and summer, it truly is a sight to behold. You need an eye and a nose for things like this, of course.
Our valley has been the center of our lives for generations. We are born here, learn the Merudri ways of our ancestors and no matter where our paths may take us, will return to this place eventually.
The experiences I made on my pilgrimage are mine and mine alone. It is of my own free will to share them with fellow Merudri only as of now.
Pema will be the successor to our Enpa Rudra. She will continue to fight for our legacy with just as much passion and wisdom when her time comes.

messages.greet: Harmony, friend. Allow me to welcome you in the {Blue Valley}. I offer guidance for the {pilgrimage} and can provide {healing}. Or can I help you otherwise?
messages.farewell: Harmony and balance on your travels, friend.

messages.greet: I welcome you, monk. Now that you have been brought here, tell me what you seek in this most sacred place. I can also teach you {spells} or {promote} you.
messages.farewell: Focus on truth and balance and you will stay on the path.

keywords.response: I can promote you for 20000 gold coins. Do you want me to promote you?
I can teach you {rune spells} and {instant spells}. What kind of spell do you wish to learn? You can also tell me for which level you would like to learn a spell, if you prefer that.
I sell {healing spells}, {attack spells} and {support spells}. Which of these interests you most?
In this category I have '{Magic Patch}', '{Light Healing}', '{Intense Healing}', '{Cure Poison}', '{Restore Balance}', '{Spirit Mend}' and '{Mass Spirit Mend}'.

In this category I have '{Tiger Clash}', '{Swift Jab}', '{Double Jab}', '{Greater Tiger Clash}', '{Chained Penance}', '{Sweeping Takedown}', '{Flurry of Blows}', '{Greater Flurry of Blows}' and '{Devastating Knockout}'.
I sell {support rune spells}. Which of these interests you most?
In this category I have '{Destroy Field Rune}' and '{Disintegrate Rune}'.
Monks are no subjects and there is no king without subjects. Our community is bound by tradition and harmony. Our {hierarchies} are shaped by our legacy.
The Yng, our nemesis, scourge of our ancestors and defining our legacy. Entering our realm through the depths of the reality rift, they terrorised the Merudri for centuries.
I am the current Enpa of our community in this sacred valley.
I am Enpa Rudra, welcome to the {valley}.
BLUE VALLEY
Name is Saih, I greet you, pilgrim.

The valley has been our home as it has been the home of our ancestors who were separated from the birth-place. It is a place worth fighting for. As is the legacy of the Merudri and everything we achieved.
We are Merudri, this valley has been our sanctuary for centuries and is the only thing left from our true ancestral home.
